Name: Afterglow
Description: This is Gray Raven, now entering the City 015 ruins.
StarDesc[2]: Fight till the last moment.

Name: Origin
StarDesc[2]: Fight till the last moment.

Name: Dark Red
Description: Take a long, hard look at what humanity really is.
StarDesc[2]: Fight till the last moment.

Name: Dawn
Description: A new commandant has arrived to join Gray Raven on a mission to take back the Earth.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: A Brief Transit
Description: To ensure the victory in Zone Q1, Gray Raven decided to head further into the zone.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Farewell Gift
Description: During the battle, Gray Raven received a rendezvous signal, so they decided to set C-point as the temporary destination.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Graffiti Blast
Description: Traces of graffiti. Facing such eerie artwork, Liv decided to join the battle.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Full Strength
Description: Commandant, now you can try using Liv in the battle. - Lucia
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Restoring Scene
Description: After reaching C-point, all Gray Raven saw were the remains of their comrades, as well as the Corrupted feasting on them. Get rid of them.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Lost in Mist
Description: Lucia found an arm from the remains that fit her just well. The Corrupted ahead are perfect targets for her to test it.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: A Soft Heart
Description: All squads are C-point were wiped out, but there are more than 1 temporary rendezvous point. Gray Raven decides to check the other points.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: The Purpose
Description: One of the Corrupted kept making a "giggling" sound. Go after it.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: The Followers
Description: The rendezvous point in the city had also fallen. After investigating the remains, Gray Raven realized their actions were completely transparent to the Corrupted. But they need to get rid of the enemies ahead first.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Base Color
Description: Realizing that the enemy had everything planned, Lee lost his cool. However, new pursuers showed up in front of the quarreling Gray Raven.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Self Analysis
Description: Gray Raven found a place to regroup in the city. Liv and Lucia picked two plushies from the ruins, but more Corrupted came out of the buildings.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Final Work
Description: To seize control of this area again, Gray Raven decided to cross the city and head toward the factory, where the New Variant was found.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: A Strange New Friend
Description: After destroying the new variant, the Corrupted became disorganized again. Gray Raven decided to take this opportunity to establish a safe route to the portal.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Strange Signal
Description: Many out-of-control Corrupted were wandering on the bridge. Get rid of them, so the "Iso-Device" can be installed.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Old Acquaintance
Description: Another task force team was also on a mission in this area. Thanks to their "careless mistake", Gray Raven had to deal with more Corrupted.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Relic
Description: Lee is an expert military engineer. The bridge is still not safe, but the best you can do is to protect him while he sets up the Iso-Device.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Language Game
Description: To reach the portal, one must go through the city occupied by many Corrupted. Clean this area like what you did last time.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Will to Survive
Description: Liv won the recognition of other team members through her hard work and excellent battle performance. Keep the momentum going and clear the next area.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Iso-Device
Description: It suddenly started to rain. Protect Lee so he could set up the Iso-Device before the rain gets worse.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Rescue Signal
Description: While setting up the Iso-Device, The team received a signal from a Construct requesting aid. Help him as soon as possible.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Will of Steel
Description: The rescued Construct's injuries were too serious and he had to be restarted, which would inevitably wipe all his memories. Still, Gray Raven had to keep going.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: A "Safe" Exit
Description: This is the last area linking to the Portal. Protect Lee so he can set up a safe route.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: The Proud
Description: Gray Raven received another rescue signal. Don't lose him this time!
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: End of Torture
Description: The rescued Corrupted seemed very anxious. Gray Raven decided to help him evacuate the area first.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Seeds
Description: The true identity of the Princess was still unknown. After learning about "Operation Portal" from Kamui of Strike Hawk, Gray Raven headed toward the Estate.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Terminal
Description: Hassen gave you a priority mission. Before joining Strike Hawk, you need to retrieve the Constructs in the subway station with Gray Raven.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Driven by Instinct
Description: Tifa was also one of the "new variants". How the Corrupted suddenly gained the ability to think was still unknown, but they quickly occupied the subway station after she was gone.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Good Samaritan
Description: The Corrupted significantly impacted the retrieval of Constructs. Gray Raven decided to split into two groups; one would continue working on the retrieval, while the other would focus on fighting the Corrupted.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Trespassing
Description: Operation Portal was run by Strike Hawk. After joining forces with them, Gray Raven was assigned the task of scouting in the Estate where the portal was located.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Traps
Description: After scouting, Gray Raven's next task is night patrol.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Final Warning
Description: Operation Portal is about to start. Gray Raven and Strike Hawk will launch a joint attack on the Estate.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Take Caution
Description: A new variant, along with many Corrupted reinforcements, suddenly appeared in the Estate. Defeat the new variant and evacuate ASAP.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Special Mission
Description: The first attempt failed, but Strike Hawk had no plans to give up the operation. Gray Raven was asked to patrol in the night for tomorrow's mission.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Twisted Modification
Description: The operation has started again. Gray Raven will distract the enemy so Strike Hawk can infiltrate the Estate.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Each Loyal to Their Own
Description: To attract as much firepower as possible, Gray Raven decided to enter the Estate building.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: A New Seed
Description: For some unknown reason, Gray Raven lost contact with Strike Hawk. The priority now is to get out of this place.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Night Escape
Description: Strike Hawk suffered a heavy loss, so Kamui was reassigned to Gray Raven, whose last task here is to establish a safe zone.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Deduction
Description: Cover Lee so he could set up the Iso-Device outside the Estate and hence establish a safe route between the base and the portal.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Beneficiary
Description: A siren suddenly went off in the Estate. Check it out and ensure the portal is safe.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Breaking Through
Description: Turned out it was some Corrupted that triggered the safety robots. Destroy the Corrupted and the robots.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Lurking Sand
Description: The portal was tampered by Roland and failed to send you to the designated location. After some discussion, you decided to walk there.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Panic Dive
Description: Kamui seemed to have this desert's information. Gray Raven headed toward the desert base for supplies and Construct maintenance.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: The Forsaken
Description: The desert base was under attack of the Corrupted. Defeat them to protect the base.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Negotiation
Description: Gray Raven was met with some uninvited guests who called themselves the "Forsaken", and was attacked by one of the male Constructs.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Left Behind
Description: The "Forsaken" Constructs seemed to know Lucia and Kamui. Gray Raven set off once again to seize the base and find out the truth.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Kidnapping
Description: The mysterious Construct who clearly disliked humans appeared again. He was upset by Gray Raven as they were taking orders from you. A battle is imminent.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Noises
Description: The male Construct took advantage of the Corrupted's habits and got them to attack Gray Raven. Lucia seemed to have recalled something during the battle though...?
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Bloody Truth
Description: The enemy Construct's name was Watanabe. But before Lucia could recall more, a type of enemy named "Guardian" started to attack...
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Pursuit
Description: Executive Nikolai sent the Purifying Force to hunt deserter Liv. Time is running out, but you must find Liv and take care of the unconscious Lucia at the same time.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Blind Fight
Description: Lee and Kamui had an argument about the dismembered team. Their heated debate caught the Corrupted's attention.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Dispelling Illusions
Description: The team still had different opinions, but the priority was to treat Lucia. You decided to head toward the oasis that Kamui mentioned.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: A Smart Path
Description: The team was finally able to have a break, but more Corrupted were in the way to the terminal that could be used to heal Lucia.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: True Form
Description: While the desert terminal is "decompressing" Lucia's M.I.N.D., get Lee and Kamui to hold off the enemies.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Suppressed Illusions
Description: After Lucia woke up, she wanted to stay alone. Recalling the tragedies of the First Force seemed to have impacted her significantly. You decided to check her situation.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Humanoid
Description: Lucia only wanted peace of mind. Yet, the new variant claimed she could be "freed" from the past.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Supervisor
Description: The guilt from the past and the feeling of powerlessness are killing Lucia. Defeat the new variant along with Kamui.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: The Light of Seven
Description: Gray Raven isn't exactly ready to flee, but it's time to run from the Purifying Force.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Lost Sword
Description: You must find Liv before the Purifying Force does. She might be with the Forsaken. Gray Raven decided to check the desert base.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Turning the Table
Description: The base was completely empty, but the radar suggested that Gray Raven was already at Liv's location. The earth suddenly started to tremble...
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Liv's Return
Description: The unknown earthquake also attracted the Guardian to the base. Protect the base and try to reach Liv's location!
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Tracking the Ascendant
Description: After resting in a Forsaken camp for a night, Gray Raven has received a new mission from Babylonia.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Deep Under
Description: Under the desert was a gigantic city that wasn't recorded on maps. You decided to walk around first.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Mystery
Description: It's difficult to find the entry to the bureau on bare foot. Going high above the ground may be a good option.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Powerful Reinforcement
Description: New variants awaited Gray Raven on the high platform. Defeat them.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Mind Noises
Description: According to Watanabe, this city belonged to Kurono Group. They might have put the map in one of the facilities in the city center.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Parting Ways
Description: The conflict between Nanami and Watanabe seemed to have started here. A number of Corrupted had gathered here since they left.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Greater Threats
Description: Many guards outside the central facility had already turned into Corrupted. Defeat them to find a way into the facility.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Detonation
Description: Gray Raven triggered the alarm upon entering the facility. Close all the exits now.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Cleansing
Description: The central facility didn't have much internal damage. Gray Raven decided to split up and search for the map of the underground city.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Evacuation
Description: There are many terminals storing different data in the facility. Defeat the Corrupted one by one and look for the map.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Cerberus
Description: Lee, Kamui and Lucia each picked a different area. In front of Lucia is the Living District.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Purifying Force
Description: A room in the Living District reminded Lucia of the days when she and the Princess of Punishing were sisters. Then the siren went off again.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Left Behind
Description: 粛清部隊との交戦が造反と看做され、グレイレイヴン指揮官はニコラに拘束された。一方、廃墟にいるルシアが目を覚ます。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Buried Alive
Description: 粛清部隊の攻撃によりグレイレイヴンは深部へと落下し、散り散りになってしまった。ルシアは移動中にリーとリーフを発見する。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Restructure
Description: 隊員を捜索していたグレイレイヴンは、交戦中のワタナベとナナミを見つけた。交戦の理由は不明だが、まずは止めなくては。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Unexpected Alliance
Description: どうやらカムイも侵蝕体と戦闘中のようだ。グレイレイヴンは援護に向かう。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Split
Description: 地底のグレイレイヴンは、指揮官とコンタクトを取るためにもまず地上に戻る方法を探すことにした。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Pursuit
Description: どうやら粛清部隊も内部抗争に巻き込まれていたようだ。「グレイレイヴンを攻撃しない」という条件付きで、ビアンカは出口捜索のチームに合流した。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Clash
Description: どうやらワタナベはかつての第1部隊で唯一再起動を回避した構造体らしい。ビアンカが詳細を聞こうと思った瞬間、話の腰を折るように侵蝕体が出現する。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Abnormal Energy
Description: 粛清部隊のカレニーナは、ルシアに対して一方ならぬ執着を持っているらしい。話しをするためには、一戦交える他ない。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Boiling Consciousness
Description: 地下通路の果てに遺跡が高々とそびえ立っている。グレイレイヴンは手掛かりを求めて遺跡内部へ入った。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Besieged
Description: ナナミに接続なしでグレイレイヴンの状況を確認できる方法を教わり、一緒に遺跡の奥へと進むことにした。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Two Frontlines
Description: 遺跡内部は迷宮のように入り組んでいた。帰り道が閉ざされてしまい、先へと進むしか他なくなった。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: End of the Path
Description: 遺跡の奥には何もなく、行き止まりだった。皆が戻ろうとした時、ナナミがスイッチを……
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Dawn
Description: 帕弥什一举感染统治局外围的感染体和空中的伊甸，危亡之间哈桑让你孤军出战，目标：统治局！
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Potential Unlocked
Description: グレイレイヴンは遺跡を通り抜け、統治局にたどり着いた。そこで待ち受けていたのは、かつての仲間の成れの果てだった……
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Obstacle
Description: パニシングに侵蝕された仲間に加えて最初に遭遇した特異体も現れ、グレイレイヴンの行く手に立ち塞がった。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Clone
Description: 感染体们的愿望是包含自身在内的毁灭，一旦伊甸被帕弥什占领，那事情将不可收拾，突破过去。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Weeping Rose
Description: 统治局毫无疑问是一个不见底的深渊，而根据七实所说的，帕弥什的主电脑放在了最下层。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Path of Torture
Description: ルナの手により蘇ったティファが深淵への道を守っている。まずはティファの操る侵蝕体を倒さなければならない。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Remnants
Description: ティファは最後の力を振り絞り、リーの身体の制御を奪った。リーを傷つけないようにティファを攻撃しなければ。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Justice
Description: 深淵に至るまでの階層には様々なガードが配備されている。この層に配備された侵蝕体はパニシングを植え付けてくるようだ。攻撃には細心の注意を払わなければならない。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: Birth of Planets
Description: In the eyes of the 'Gate,' Earth's civilization is but a flawed system ready to be reaped and reclaimed.

Name: Until the sun rises.
Description: Please... call my name, as I once did, over and over again.

Name: Froggie and the Four-leaf Clover
Description: The four-leaf clover may not bring miracles, but the quest to find it will surely lead to one.

Name: A canal that leads to the Galaxy
Description: How many more of these righteous deaths will it take before our wounds carve a canal to the Galaxy?

Name: The Search for Tomorrow
Description: If only one of us is destined to find tomorrow, I hope it is you.

Name: Pyroath of the Long Night
Description: For this alone, I will not yield!

Name: What's "Transform into a Butterfly"?
Description: You shall be cut and carved... until only life remains.

Name: Slaughterhouse #5
Description: Listen to me—Billy Pilgrim has broken free from the chains of time.

Name: The Final Interview
Description: I think the greatest, most frightening, and tragic form of hypocrisy in life is the truth that no one dares face—that humanity does not cherish life.

Name: The Bridge Across Dreams
Description: She came upon the bridge they had left behind.

Name: Homecoming Butterfly
Description: Before everything faded, she thought back to the beginning once more—not that of Agent Zero, but the one that belonged to Cradle.

Name: Victim of Suicide Epidermic
Description: The primary goal now is to sacrifice oneself for the sake of survival.

Name: Shaper's Ripples
Description: We have found the seed of miracles.

Name: A River of Blossoms
Description: She saw the scenes from her past.

Name: A Future Yet to Be
Description: The wooden door creaks open, and against the light, a familiar yet unfamiliar Construct appears before her.

Name: Irreversible End
Description: She sits detachedly in a corner of the snowy plain. The wind howls, the mutated Red Tide intertwines with snowflakes, and the twisted patterns resemble corroded marble.

Name: Fate's Onslaught
Description: Dusk drips with bloodstains as the human and the girl watch the twilight fall and the pale moonlight wash over the land.

Name: Rose in Winter
Description: It's—very important, okay? Remember that! Give it to the Gray Raven Commandant!

Name: Solitary City
Description: She doesn't reply. A sword energy tears through the air, severing the crimson shadows in the void.

Name: Apocalypse Voyage
Description: Regardless of what happens next, she should first lead her comrades away from the looming danger.

Name: A Small Star
Description: Alright! Let the great Nanami solve this disaster!

Name: Blended Worlds
Description: Countless absurd "futures" intertwine, mocking her powerlessness.

Name: Chaos
Description: Her eyes are vacant as she stares straight ahead, like a soulless doll, acting only on instinct.

Name: Anchor
Description: The massive starship glides low over the city that humans once called home.

Name: With the Flow
Description: As they journey north, the cold in the air begins to freeze on the starship's viewport.

Name: Into the Unknown
Description: Babylonia is leaving Earth, isn't it?

Name: Beyond the Ruins
Description: Does this world still point towards the futures she once envisioned?

Name: Spider Silk
Description: Transparent spider silk floats in the ocean, disappearing as soon as you look away.

Name: River of Time
Description: A familiar yet strange voice reaches the girl's ears, carried across endless time and space.

Name: Grand Entrance
Description: Perhaps she's been deceived by illusions many times before, but no matter how often, she still rushes towards the Commandant without hesitation.

Name: Grand Entrance
Description: Perhaps she's been deceived by illusions many times before, but no matter how often, she still rushes towards the Commandant without hesitation.

Name: Grand Entrance
Description: Perhaps she's been deceived by illusions many times before, but no matter how often, she still rushes towards the Commandant without hesitation.

Name: Grand Entrance
Description: Perhaps she's been deceived by illusions many times before, but no matter how often, she still rushes towards the Commandant without hesitation.

Name: Towards a Farther Star
Description: Next, I give you the welcome ceremony of the Loving Community!

Name: Cursed Wisdom
Description: The crimson tower will eventually descend, and this peaceful land, this age of gold and wine, will eventually be swallowed by the waves.

Name: All Roads Lead to This Moment
Description: Brilliant meteors streak across the cosmos, and lush rivers silently multiply.

Name: Time Marches On
Description: Redundant, excessive, and accumulated information is piled up in towering spires, creating a chaotic landscape.

Name: Trajectory
Description: Everything is moving forward according to fate's trajectory, and a small butterfly seems unable to cause a larger ripple.

Name: Let's go!
Description: Charge! I would give everything I have—for the Commandant!

Name: A Gift for Tomorrow
Description: A small, glowing star is placed in her palm.

Name: After Departure
Description: Perhaps... she can serve as a catalyst, igniting the entire endless cycle.

Name: The Hymn of Time
Description: With fingers dancing across the strings, the bard weaves a soft saga in a murmured song.

Name: A Never-Ending Winter
Description: The enemy ahead is not only frozen rock but also melting ice caverns.

Name: Sink Silently Into the Sea
Description: The brown and white can no longer be seen on the plains. Beneath a cloudless sky, the red waves are marching triumphantly.

Name: Cradlesong
Description: Mournful and elusive, the melody drifts like an antique rite, silencing the entire raucous camp.

Name: In the Snowstorm
Description: Perhaps another tributary of fate's river could've guided her into a more serene future.

Name: Murky Moonlight
Description: Amid the cold wind rustling the trees under the moonlight, no one can hear Luna's voice anymore.

Name: Death Knell
Description: Their story comes to an end like what she once saw in the Ascension-Network.

Name: Tomorrow
Description: Once the last remnants of humanity at the Grand Tombstone arrive at Aerospace City, the Grand Tombstone will finally rest as its name implies.

Name: Burn
Description: Put me down now and go back to Aerospace City!

Name: Ishmael's Fable
Description: Wonderful reactions occur each time an old tale is added with new variables. Such changes always bring me delight.

Name: Ishmael's Fable
Description: Wonderful reactions occur each time an old tale is added with new variables. Such changes always bring me delight.

Name: Ishmael's Fable
Description: Wonderful reactions occur each time an old tale is added with new variables. Such changes always bring me delight.

Name: Flames Blanketed by Snow
Description: A torch, flickering with crimson-gold flames that light up the land in an instant, is hoisted aloft like a runner's baton.

Name: Firewood
Description: I will bring back new firewood myself to stoke the flame of human civilization.

Name: Another Choice
Description: Perhaps this could be another choice for you and this civilization.

Name: High Wall
Description: Time stalls in this moment, where sunlight freezes atop the pine treetops and the cold wind ceases to blow. Will you raise high walls, or venture into the unknown?

Name: Stairs at the Edge
Description: Her gaze is always locked here.

Name: Spiral Tower
Description: Whether to become an Observer or to stay forever in the Hetero Tower, take a moment to rest... at least for now.

Name: Gravekeeper
Description: Human civilization has been branded with the Punishing Virus. Whether you choose me or return to the sea, nothing could be worse than it is now.

Name: At the Cost of Life
Description: We will seek our path, even at the cost of everything.

Name: Dangerous Place
Description: Even though people seek their path through death, a part of them still hopes to endure life and see tomorrow.

Name: Born Again
Description: Her completeness is beyond my imagination. Probably something unexpected has happened.

Name: Lone Shadow in Corridor
Description: Raise your head before the mirror. Tell me, Commandant of Gray Raven, who are you truly?
StarDesc[1]: Explore and leave this unfamiliar city

Name: Death Reenactment
Description: Fervently eyeing the agent like a butterfly specimen, Cradle suddenly seems to have lost interest in everything else.

Name: Gazing From Above
Description: Countless years of "information" amassed by the Hetero Tower flow ceaselessly into the M.I.N.D. Civilizations lament the final requiem in sorrowful song.

Name: Four-Winged White Raven
Description: At the center of the "buildings" with varied exteriors stands a colossal four-winged white raven.

Name: Heat Death in Time
Description: Heat death is but a hypothesis, a construct of fiction, a distant catastrophe that will never truly arrive.

Name: The Punisher
Description: The "Punisher" is the "Agent Zero" belonging to the Four-Winged White Raven.

Name: Double Spirals
Description: As long as Commandant and Nanami keep pushing forward, we'll surely reach the day of victory someday!

Name: Annihilation
Description: A faint will flickers like a dying spark in a murky M.I.N.D.

Name: Gear
Description: This may cost her dearly, but a civilization like this deserves a future worth hoping for.

Name: Gear
Description: This may cost her dearly, but a civilization like this deserves a future worth hoping for.

Name: Gift from the Stars
Description: The shooting star carrying the information will travel back in time, heading to its destination.

Name: Vision at Dawn
Description: ...What choice will humanity make this time?

Name: Lucia
Description: It's alright... After this, we still have a long time ahead...

Name: Improper Thought
Description: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality. Yet there are times when both combine to torment us.

Name: Operation Theater
Description: We forget things to make our life seem better even though it's not necessarily what we want.

Name: Straightforwardness
Description: Detect errors with composure. Deconstruct disharmony with rationality.

Name: Protagonist
Description: Most of the struggles in life lie in how to convince oneself to accept the current absurdity.

Name: Faceless
Description: The crowds will portray you for me with the world as the canvas.

Name: The Time-Stealing Puppet
Description: Nice to meet you is all that is allowed to say at this moment.

Name: Understanding
Description: What shapes one's true self? Their own memory or others' perception of them?

Name: Reasoning
Description: From the result back to the cause.

Name: Leaving for the New World
Description: All the beautiful things have just come into blossom. All the romantic stories still have time to unfold gradually.

Name: Afterglow
Description: The moment before something happens is the most attractive.

Name: Mid Point
Description: It's the mid point, but also the end.

Name: Turning Around
Description: Regret, along with the joy of victory, vanishes into thin air.

Name: Reverse Chronology
Description: No one loves this way of narration, but the author doesn't want it to be made public.

Name: Echo
Description: I can hear... the sound of the past.

Name: Clarity
Description: Distance yourself from a corner until the entire painting unfolds before your eyes.

Name: Prefacing
Description: The path from here on will be pure and clean.

Name: Monologue
Description: She treks through a desolate wasteland.

Name: Aquarium
Description: Crimson Red Tide washes over her vision; silhouettes, aged like old film strips, drift through memories, flickering with an uncertain light.

Name: Endless Cycle
Description: This is Bianca, Captain of the Purifying Force, leading the third rescue team into the aquarium. Commencing fourth mission log.

Name: Deja Vu
Description: Through fissures in the heavy clouds, crimson light bleeds into view. At the periphery of your vision, the pale girl appears in silence.

Name: Mire
Description: They murmur in indistinct whispers, their voices weaving a haunting, almost cheerful melody beyond comprehension.

Name: Rebirth & Future
Description: Bianca is going through severe M.I.N.D. deviation.

Name: Monster, Monster
Description: The purple-haired Ascendant drifts like a phantom through this graveyard of their own making.

Name: Desperate Red Tide
Description: The Red Tide is rebirth and salvation. God shall create paradise, God shall grant eternal life through the Red Tide...

Name: Shifting Story
Description: With such "changes" happening, will the story's "ending"... still be the same as what was seen in the "shadows"?

Name: Platform
Description: In the church amid the wind and snow, she sees herself praying devoutly.

Name: Kill Chiko
Description: Remember, don't trust a word Vonnegut says. Kill Chiko, take the Heteromer Shard.

Name: Tears
Description: Don't you want to break free from this endless sorrow? All you have to do is...

Name: Falling
Description: He'll drown all the haywire seeds together in this aquarium that's about to crash.

Name: Her Farewell
Description: The blue-haired "monster" absorbs this altar and the Red Tide of this sea area; its form grows massive, to the point of distortion.

Name: Heteromer Shard
Description: The "answer" is hidden within a secret only the Commandant knows!

Name: New Future
Description: There's still some ground to cover. Let's keep moving, Commandant.

Name: Custom Movie
Description: Today is just another ordinary day.

Name: False Loop
Description: She can only drift like a withered leaf, swept along by the world's grand narrative into the fierce current rushing ahead.

Name: Bianca's Story
Description: Neither tragedy nor comedy, but a story that belongs only to you... only to "Bianca."

Name: Faith
Description: When you're powerless to change things, all you can do is turn to faith.

Name: Trial
Description: That is a "reborn" world, where there's no endless fleeing, no Corrupted or monsters, and certainly no death.

Name: Karma
Description: No life can rewrite the universe's laws. Yet you just might...

Name: Lost Tower
Description: A crimson spiral piercing the clouds—but it never arrives as promised.

Name: They
Description: He seems to be absorbing endless information, and yet sees nothing at all.

Name: New Born City
Description: As if someone had stitched it in from another world, the outline of a magnificent city slowly appears on the horizon, revealed by the drone's camera.

Name: Breaking Free
Description: The silver-white girl lies trapped within crimson crystal clusters, sleeping peacefully like a lamb waiting for sacrifice.

Name: Seawater Hangs Suspended in the Sky
Description: The lost hero, the human, the Gray Raven Commandant, is reliving everything that happened in the deep sea within this narrow dreamscape.

Name: Raging Tide
Description: Everything unfolds before the eyes like a scene on repeat. Words materialize before your eyes, then slowly fade, leaving only whispers echoing in the mind.

Name: Tabula Akasha
Description: The ruler of Kowloong returns to her throne.

Name: Tabula Akasha
Description: The ruler of Kowloong returns to her throne.

Name: Data Space Phantom
Description: Are you a time traveler? Did you mess everything up?

Name: Dark Star
Description: No matter how many times it falls, there is only one moon in the world.

Name: Absurd Hypothesis
Description: If anyone could manage this and reach that destination, it would perhaps be this human before me, who has already created so many miracles.

Name: Endless Fog
Description: Endless white fog fills Lucia's vision.

Name: Predestined Ending
Description: I will wait for the day when this world once again falls into its eternal predicament, heading toward that same destruction.

Name: New Fruit
Description: Perhaps it was bitter enough to make her want to gnaw on fate's backbone and roar at the world's injustice, but... no matter what, that is already in the past.

Name: Formless and Soundless
Description: Love is something formless and soundless.

Name: Forbidden History
Description: I can't grant you that authority either, Asimov.

Name: Another Starting Point
Description: They said that inside the mine... there was information about M.I.N.D. "evolution." And if they could get it out...

Name: Twilight
Description: Most mountains of the mining area stand stark and treeless, their towering shadows stretching in twisted shapes across the land.

Name: Conservation Area 368
Description: She leaves her hands in plain view—intricate mechanical constructs of interlocking gears and components that are unmistakably artificial.

Name: The Web Weaver
Description: With a soft, whirring rustle, a mechanical spider dances in the corner, its eight legs weaving an intricate web in the air.

Name: Uncertainty
Description: In the shadows cast by sunlight, countless similar tragedies unfold unseen.

Name: Among the Mountains
Description: The mineral crystals in the rock walls pulse with halos of unseen light, while Hetero-Creatures—or perhaps something else entirely—stir and rustle in the depths of their shadowy nest.

Name: Dazed Nightmare
Description: A deep, thunder-like rumbling echoes through the rocky cavern.

Name: The Veil Between
Description: Her gaze stretches across the conservation area, where a thick mist shrouds the layered mountains, dissolving the very horizon into a seamless, muted grey.

Name: Shrouded in Darkness
Description: I'll give her everything—anything she could ever want—as long as she desires it and I can get it for her.

Name: Liv's Choice
Description: If you know the future is paved with struggles and pain... will you still walk toward it?

Name: Vision Interference
Description: Everything around you peels away like faded wallpaper, as various scenes flicker into being like rapidly changing stage sets from Golden Age films.

Name: Illusion
Description: Ethereal and ghost-like, they drift forth, their dresses rippling like water and shimmering with a pale, phosphorescent glow.

Name: One Day
Description: I won't mourn for you, because this is just a brief parting.

Name: Family
Description: The world begins with a lingering sigh.

Name: Frozen Time
Description: She takes your hands in hers, presses them gently against her cheek, and places a soft kiss upon them.

Name: A Long Dream
Description: Your field of vision suddenly lurches skyward. This unbearably long "dream" grinds on, unbroken by your "unconscious" state.

Name: Closing the Net
Description: Clouds part to reveal the sun as that seed begins to sprout.

Name: When the Dream Ends
Description: Love spins itself into a cocoon, holding you securely within. In her arms, she cradles her entire world.

Name: The Lab
Description: The "Model III-0007-Psychiatrist Generation III" sits silently behind the desk. Then, without any human activation, it slowly opens its eyes.

Name: Don't Look Back
Description: Once again, with her own hands, she has set her child adrift on an uncertain future.

Name: Cocoon of Love
Description: She wove an enormous, intricate web to wrap the child inside it... and in doing so, became trapped herself.

Name: Birth
Description: What does she want with Liv's M.I.N.D.? Why exactly... was she created?

Name: Tree of Life
Description: He still remembers that dark and damp Golden Age.

Name: Fate of the Hacker
Description: A pool of deep, glistening vital fluid soaks through pink synthetic hair. The young girl, Christina, lies broken and motionless.

Name: Investigate
Description: Oh, and these Yeti? They're apparently fungal crab-things.

Name: Do Constructs Dream of Electric Sparrows?
Description: Do you often feel surrounded by darkness? Touch.

Name: The damaged...
Description: Yes. The truth has always been just one page away.

Name: BWV 478
Description: Every person in society—even the most "normal"—suffers from some degree of mental illness.

Name: Killing a Sparrow
Description: Ah, so this is where the mockery took place.

Name: Kill a Sparrow
Description: Ah, so this is where the mockery took place.

Name: Night Talk
Description: All I want is to protect Elysium—this city.

Name: Night and Rose
Description: Amid the swirling shards in the sky, a thousand roses shimmered in the light.

Name: World of Bliss
Description: Your mission this time: locate as many quantum supercomputers without AI as possible.

Name: Truth
Description: Purifying Force on duty! Defector, stand down and surrender!

Name: Neural Wandering
Description: Invasive Brain-Machine Extension Applications: A Hypothesis.

Name: Don Quixote
Description: You will become the sinner—and I, the jester who cheers you on.

Name: Rebirth
Description: I am the green-eyed demon. I am the Sixth Sin. I am John Doe. I am—Envy.

Name: Paradiso, Canto III
Description: Summon me with thine own flesh!

Name: Variable
Description: Tell me, have you truly reached the throne, or are you just a convincing imitation?

Name: Gravity
Description: Babylonia is projected to reach Earth's gravitational capture point in three hours and twenty-seven minutes.

Name: Falling
Description: Then, she feels the warm sunlight.

Name: First Encounter
Description: Join the battle when you're ready.

Name: Old Comrade
Description: Things have changed a bit, but the people are the same. Let's share what we know.

Name: Prepare for Amalgamation!
Description: Amalgamation is the answer to this frozen land.

Name: Sophiasburgh (1)
Description: Now, let's take a look at the rear.

Name: Separate Battles
Description: Everyone moves with one goal: winning the war.

Name: Frostheart Warlords
Description: Rosetta takes Dulova. Dark Aries handles the other two.

Name: Causes of War
Description: I've seen it in its complete form.

Name: Before the Next Battle
Description: Let's get fully prepared with Rosetta.

Name: The Ram vs. the Mantis
Description: A little body-bending's no big deal for a Construct, right?

Name: Creative Thinking
Description: Load multiple M.I.N.D.s into a single frame.

Name: Sophiasburgh (3)
Description: This isn't about Sophiasburgh or the Arctic Route Union. It's about the people who live here.

Name: Disorder and Chaos
Description: You've forgotten whose territory this is.

Name: Ultimate Amalgamator
Description: Everywhere the aurora reaches falls under Amalgamation.

Name: Head-on Showdown
Description: Right now, the only option is to fight with everything we have.

Name: Capture Luck
Description: I'm ready to catch some luck.

Name: People of the Snow
Description: We'll have to start again, but that's not a bad thing.

Name: The Final Amalgamation
Description: Let's see whose Amalgamation can claim this frozen land and shape the world's future.

Name: The Weight of Truth
Description: Yet years later, when Nirvatia enters the World Government Archives to review everything that happened that day...

Name: Security Director
Description: Asimov shrugs and dials the number.

Name: Gray Raven Commandant
Description: The slightest tilt of the scales made you believe you were on the verge of victory... Such is the arrogance and delusion the Reconquista Age has instilled in you.

Name: The Girls
Description: Forge yourselves in this boundless world!

Name: Classroom Duel
Description: I flipped through the textbook once and memorized everything.

Name: Silent Distance
Description: Nirvatia staggers, her right shoulder crashing into you.

Name: Children of The Tempest
Description: What determines a person's worth has never been about what you can achieve, but rather what you're willing to sacrifice for a righteous cause.

Name: Defense of Carthaki
Description: War and peace, and their own little birthday.

Name: Cries by the Riverbank
Description: I belong to the Forsaken. This isn't my home... at least not anymore, sir.

Name: Rescue Mission
Description: The two girls step forward in different directions at the same time.

Name: Nothing Today
Description: If you don't forget to look back, we'll always see each other again.

Name: Ownerless Letter
Description: The Great Akdilek Explosion, the Golden Oak, the Ascendant, Margaret... We might be just one step away from the truth.

Name: Heroes Are the People
Description: Live on. For a better tomorrow.

Name: Goodbye, Carthaki
Description: Together, we will set this stagnant world in motion.

Name: Racing Against Death
Description: I made a choice, and perhaps it was the wrong one... I don't know, but I've been paying the price for it.

Name: Operation Hebron
Description: Nirvatia tilts her face upward, silently gazing at the monument that has witnessed both triumph and tragedy.

Name: Golden Oak
Description: Can you really bring down this giant tree on your own?

Name: Comrades
Description: Now they're setting out, to reclaim their family, and to take back their blood-soaked victory.

Name: The Last Bullet
Description: No matter how painful and long the night, there will always be flames determined to crash against the darkness, igniting miracles.

Name: Echoes of a Cherished Wish
Description: Guided by countless hopes, she keeps moving forward.

Name: The Master and Margaret
Description: If this place is shrouded in darkness, let me become the first ray of light.

Name: A Better Tomorrow
Description: And when the sun rises, a better tomorrow will surely follow.

Name: Hunt
Description: She stares at the figure in the crimson waves. Familiar, and yet not. Decades carved out of her life float there, adrift in red.

Name: Prism Square
Description: Only the fragments of prisms strewn about and the tower still standing tall bear witness to the glory that once defined this place.

Name: Dead End
Description: Save for the skittering of monsters and the bloodstains, the place is silent as a tomb.

Name: Old Friend
Description: That designation sequence doesn't exist at all...

Name: The Exiled Dreamer
Description: The fog is cold, like the day... they left... for the 21st time...

Name: The Way Here
Description: Tomorrow... the others and I are going on a long trip.

Name: The End Is the Beginning
Description: This cruel world offers them nothing. No victory. No answers...

Name: Alpha
Description: They all left, one after another... Did the last hero fail too?

Name: Setting Sail
Description: It is Lucia who opens the door.

Name: Lucia
Description: Once again, she becomes her mother's child.

Name: The Opening Drill
Description: Like a front-runner who has long since forgotten the sound of footsteps behind her, turning to find she is no longer alone in the wind. She can't remember the last time she felt this happy.

Name: Falling Sky
Description: At that very instant, alarms blare across every corner of F.O.S.

Name: Wish Upon the Stars
Description: Either way, we'll all see each other again one day.

Name: Graduation
Description: Back then, they had yet to set sail. Their joy knew no end in sight.

Name: Homecoming Banquet
Description: Since I said I'd only say it once, I had to come up with another way...

Name: The Same Starting Point
Description: Only after leaving port and losing home does one understand what it means to go back home.

Name: Pilgrimage / Life / Ordeal
Description: Just think of us as the scapegoats this story needs, alright?

Name: Pyroath
Description: I'm so afraid of how much I will miss you.

Name: Crown
Description: One day, beyond all the paths that pulled us apart, we will find our way back together.

Name: The Ending's Two Halves
Description: All I have left is my life. It's the last thing I can freely choose for myself.

Name: The Ending's Other Half
Description: The universe showed no mercy for that unfulfilled promise, yet someone who cared enough pulled her back into this moment.

Name: Homecoming Voyage
Description: This path we set out on was always meant to be a long journey home.

Name: Passing Strangers
Description: But she doesn't need an answer anymore.

Name: Patched Memories
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Hello World
Description: During the battle, Gray Raven received a rendezvous signal, so they decided to set C-point as the temporary destination.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Repair Damaged Sector
Description: Lee didn't think Liv was fit for battle, so he asked her to follow behind. However, they were ambushed, and Liv decided to pick up a weapon.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Infection
Description: Commandant, now you can try using Liv in the battle. - Lucia
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Repair Damaged Sector 2
Description: After reaching C-point, all Gray Raven saw were the remains of their comrades, as well as the Corrupted feasting on them. Get rid of them.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Initial Inspiration
Description: Lucia found an arm from the remains that fit her just well. The Corrupted ahead are perfect targets for her to test it.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Into the M.I.N.D.
Description: After destroying the new variant, the Corrupted became disorganized again. Gray Raven decided to take this opportunity to establish a safe route to the portal.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Dark Struggle
Description: Many out-of-control Corrupted were wandering on the bridge. Get rid of them, so the "Iso-Device" can be installed.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: New Masterpiece
Description: Another task force team was also on a mission in this area. Thanks to their "careless mistake", Gray Raven had to deal with more Corrupted.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Escape from Underground
Description: Lee is an expert military engineer. The bridge is still not safe, but the best you can do is to protect him while he sets up the Iso-Device.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Nostalgic Toy
Description: To reach the portal, one must go through the city occupied by many Corrupted. Clean this area like what you did last time.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Collapsed Bridge
Description: Liv won the recognition of other team members through her hard work and excellent battle performance. Keep the momentum going and clear the next area.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Arrival
Description: The true identity of the Princess was still unknown. After learning about "Operation Portal" from Kamui of Strike Hawk, Gray Raven headed toward the Estate.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Vintage Taste
Description: Hassen gave you a priority mission. Before joining Strike Hawk, you need to retrieve the Constructs in the subway station with Gray Raven.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Enjoyment
Description: Tifa was also one of the "new variants". How the Corrupted suddenly gained the ability to think was still unknown, but they quickly occupied the subway station after she was gone.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Smiling Devil
Description: The Corrupted significantly impacted the retrieval of Constructs. Gray Raven decided to split into two groups; one would continue working on the retrieval, while the other would focus on fighting the Corrupted.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Hideous Fireworks
Description: Operation Portal was run by Strike Hawk. After joining forces with them, Gray Raven was assigned the task of scouting in the Estate where the portal was located.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Taming
Description: After scouting, Gray Raven's next task is night patrol.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Zack Activated
Description: Strike Hawk suffered a heavy loss, so Kamui was reassigned to Gray Raven, whose last task here is to establish a safe zone.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Ruthlessness
Description: Cover Lee so he could set up the Iso-Device outside the Estate and hence establish a safe route between the base and the portal.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Her
Description: A siren suddenly went off in the Estate. Check it out and ensure the portal is safe.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Protection
Description: Turned out it was some Corrupted that triggered the safety robots. Destroy the Corrupted and the robots.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Emma
Description: The portal was tampered by Roland and failed to send you to the designated location. After some discussion, you decided to walk there.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Farewell
Description: Kamui seemed to have this desert's information. Gray Raven headed toward the desert base for supplies and Construct maintenance.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Destination
Description: Executive Nikolai sent the Purifying Force to hunt deserter Liv. Time is running out, but you must find Liv and take care of the unconscious Lucia at the same time.
StarDesc[2]: Clear in 240s

Name: Tracing
Description: Lee and Kamui had an argument about the dismembered team. Their heated debate caught the Corrupted's attention.
StarDesc[2]: Clear in 240s

Name: Split Road
Description: The team still had different opinions, but the priority was to treat Lucia. You decided to head toward the oasis that Kamui mentioned.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Brawling
Description: The team was finally able to have a break, but more Corrupted were in the way to the terminal that could be used to heal Lucia.
StarDesc[2]: Clear in 240s

Name: Lost
Description: While the desert terminal is "decompressing" Lucia's M.I.N.D., get Lee and Kamui to hold off the enemies.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Swallowed
Description: After Lucia woke up, she wanted to stay alone. Recalling the tragedies of the First Force seemed to have impacted her significantly. You decided to check her situation.
StarDesc[2]: Clear in 240s

Name: Sister
Description: Liv had returned, and Nanami also volunteered to join. Gray Raven decides to take the path that Watanabe mentioned and heads toward the bureau.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Child
Description: Under the desert was a gigantic city that wasn't recorded on maps. You decided to walk around first.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Dismemberment
Description: It's difficult to find the entry to the bureau on bare foot. Going high above the ground may be a good option.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Blade
Description: New variants awaited Gray Raven on the high platform. Defeat them.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Against the Current
Description: According to Watanabe, this city belonged to Kurono Group. They might have put the map in one of the facilities in the city center.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Ending
Description: The conflict between Nanami and Watanabe seemed to have started here. A number of Corrupted had gathered here since they left.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Recurrence
Description: 粛清部隊との交戦が造反と看做され、グレイレイヴン指揮官はニコラに拘束された。一方、廃墟にいるルシアが目を覚ます。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Escort
Description: 粛清部隊の攻撃によりグレイレイヴンは深部へと落下し、散り散りになってしまった。ルシアは移動中にリーとリーフを発見する。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Kindred
Description: 隊員を捜索していたグレイレイヴンは、交戦中のワタナベとナナミを見つけた。交戦の理由は不明だが、まずは止めなくては。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Friends
Description: どうやらカムイも侵蝕体と戦闘中のようだ。グレイレイヴンは援護に向かう。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Treasure Hunt
Description: 地底のグレイレイヴンは、指揮官とコンタクトを取るためにもまず地上に戻る方法を探すことにした。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Fantasy
Description: どうやら粛清部隊も内部抗争に巻き込まれていたようだ。「グレイレイヴンを攻撃しない」という条件付きで、ビアンカは出口捜索のチームに合流した。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Report
Description: 帕弥什一举感染统治局外围的感染体和空中的伊甸，危亡之间哈桑让你孤军出战，目标：统治局！
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Retrospective Memory
Description: グレイレイヴンは遺跡を通り抜け、統治局にたどり着いた。そこで待ち受けていたのは、かつての仲間の成れの果てだった……
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Dark Pursuit
Description: パニシングに侵蝕された仲間に加えて最初に遭遇した特異体も現れ、グレイレイヴンの行く手に立ち塞がった。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Relentless
Description: 感染体们的愿望是包含自身在内的毁灭，一旦伊甸被帕弥什占领，那事情将不可收拾，突破过去。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Alter Ego
Description: 统治局毫无疑问是一个不见底的深渊，而根据七实所说的，帕弥什的主电脑放在了最下层。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Unity
Description: ルナの手により蘇ったティファが深淵への道を守っている。まずはティファの操る侵蝕体を倒さなければならない。
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Reply Signal
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Assist
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Lose Again
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Threat
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Spider
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Obstacles
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Homeward
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Deviate
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Decision
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Puppet
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Entry
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Disguise
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Mesmerized
Description: They're all trapped in this place, yet they're excited as ever for this event. Are they controlled too deep—or are they poisoned by this dream?
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Confusion
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Diminishing
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Trojan Horse
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Trapped Hound
Description: Who was the real prey? Cerberus, or Roland?
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Gold & Centaur
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Fireworks
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Deceptor
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Another Ending
Description: The war was coming to an end. Everybody had their own thoughts and plans.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Seize
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Shome
Description: The sound of anxious back-and-forth pacing fills the research room, deep in the facility.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Crushed Bones
Description: Covet that which shan't be coveted, and be prepared to go through fire and water.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: The Forgotten Land
Description: Wind blows over the vast desert, sweeping up sand and dust into a storm.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Venus Splash Park
Description: At the moment of its completion, time became frozen on this enchanted isle. The observation platform, dreamily hanging in the sky, looks almost like a border between fantasy and reality.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Game Starts
Description: Everything will end here, through a spectacular finale.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Ascension-Network
Description: Hmph, and what have you discovered? —Huff... The essence of... the Ascension-Network.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Suspicions
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: A Trivial Moment
Description: The sound of footsteps come from the end of the walkway, adding from liveliness to the sluggish street.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Nanami and Martin
Description: When the girl met the bear, they decided to celebrate with fireworks.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Bionic Machine
Description: Nanami learned that Amberia would control the bionics to harm humans. She decided to do something.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Black Figure on Snow
Description: Some strange black figures were crawling amongst the bionics.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Different Opinions
Description: Not all the bionics believed they were "manipulated." Instead, they saw Amberia's will as their own.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Roaring
Description: Nanami decided to talk to Amberia in person, but the war broke out before she could go underground.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Resonance of Anger
Description: There was nothing but sorrow in the battle between the bionics and the ARU. Nanami decided to give everything she had to stop the war.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: The Black Figure
Description: I will never forgive you, Ascendants!
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Nanami and Bionics
Description: The war had ended, but the wounds were still there. Nanami cheerfully took the cyborgs away from the snowy land.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Silence
Description: I didn't think an AI could fall silent.
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Exile
Description: You're right. My point is, Huaxu may have a new master, but has her master... really changed?
StarDesc[2]: Die less than once

Name: Mutual Destruction
StarDesc[2]: Clear within 300s

Name: Air Transportation
Description: All that the crew can do is remain in their seats, ensure that equipment and weapons are operational, and review mission details in preparation for immediate engagement upon landing on the surface.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Chief Commander
Description: Let me re-introduce myself. My name is Vanessa, commandant of Egret and chief commander of this operation.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Under the Trap
Description: Severed Corrupted limbs fall into the pit as they enveloped in blue static and crash into the bottom of the pit heavily.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Rapid Descent
Description: Your brain went blank from the zero gravity free-fall.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Night Break
Description: Unobstructed beams of moonlight shine through the windows, bring dim light into the dark interior.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Secret of Victory
Description: Deception, exploitation, abandonment... These are the laws of victory on the battlefield.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Exchange of Resources
Description: Well then, take her away. I've been growing tired of playing with the same toy anyway.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Gray Raven's Edge
Description: The electronic photo frame on the table in the lounge finally has a suitable picture.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Looking for Luna
Description: A rusty bridge extends out into the distance, its other end enveloped by the fog. Even though she cannot see it, Alpha knows where the bridge leads.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Howling Snowstorm
Description: There's no turning back for us.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Into Thin Air
Description: That's not only death for the living, they can also kill those phantoms that have passed away and remain in memory.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Meet Again
Description: Roland, I know what you are going to say. I've never brought it up because this wish will never come true.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Crossing Paths
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Martyrs
Description: I'll say this again. The road you've chosen has but one ending—absolutely nothing!
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Go to Fight
Description: There needs to be uncertainty in the world for it to be interesting, isn't that so?
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Night Gathers
Description: Lucia, I used to think of you only as a chess piece leftover from a conspiracy, a piece of data that was previously deceived and had no reason to exist.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Orphan of Science
Description: Let's just call her Lamia then.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Foolishness
Description: She's so ugly, like a monkey. Can we get her to stand up?
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Weakness
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Powerlessness
Description: A warm hug and comfort will be given to every weeping child.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Curiosity
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: The First Birth
Description: Stop dawdling. Come here, we have to make you adapt to your body right away.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Weigh Anchor
Description: We aren't devoid of weakness. We were just forced to "send" it away.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Another Journey
Description: Atlantis lived, and so did they.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Like Fate
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Collection
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Nothing
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Free Riding Guide
Description: Should I say unexpected or no surprise.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Luna's World
Description: A monster? A corpse? A weakling? A lost lamb?
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Break-in
Description: I like to throw in a few variables beyond their control when they think their plan is foolproof.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Non-lethal Joke
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Lopsided Recall
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Cage Battle
Description: Roland never sees the cycle and intertwining of these expressions in the same face.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Ending Citation
Description: I could take your life now, but I haven't.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Fisher
Description: I can give you what you want.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Undecided Middlegame
Description: With a smirk of an epiphany, Roland goes to his unknown destiny.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Preparation Behind the Scenes
Description: A wanderer walks among the ruins of the city.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Clearing the Stage
Description: I think you'll be interested in the show, Roland.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: The Show Starts
Description: Seeing them notice that he was trying to hide something, the refugee trembles and lowers his head even more.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Shadows in the Forest
Description: The forest in front looks like the Garden of Eden, where all the creatures live together in harmony. It is proudly showing off the lives residing within.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Central Purification Filter
Description: An unknown dark cage, some trapped beasts, a vague target.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Hyperplasia
Description: Before he can finish his sentence, the vine pulls him down into the shaft.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Corruption
Description: These exposed red spheres rotate from time to time among the branches, watching from the shadows everything happening inside the tower.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Movement
Description: Something has opened its eyes amid the chaos.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Center of the Show... Or Not?
Description: The audience usually doesn't get to enter the stage... But accidents happen.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: The Last Serum
Description: The wanderer walks on the desolate battlefield.
StarDesc[2]: Die no more than once.

Name: Test
Description: She is one of Ascendant's bosses, and has overwhelming combat power under the combined influence of the Ascension-Network and the Punishing Virus.

Description: She is one of Ascendant's bosses, and has overwhelming combat power under the combined influence of the Ascension-Network and the Punishing Virus.

Description: The leader of the mysterious organization only briefly existed in the history. What's the true identity of this Memory?

Description: She's the No.3 database of the mysterious organization. Will anyone ever witness her power?

Name: Catherine
Description: This is dedicated to you, my beloved rose garden.

Name: Aife
Description: Aife was the last sniper and the greatest treasure left behind by the Syndicute. She must be rescued for the sake of the humanity's future.

StarDesc[2]: Hetero Units of the same version will be connected.

StarDesc[1]: Enemies will become neutral upon taking damage at weak points

Name: Classical - Infinity
StarDesc[1]: The enemy will replicate itself each time when it has lost 40% HP.

Name: Classical - From Naughty to Good
StarDesc[1]: Turns into "Good Child" when HP drops to 50%.

Name: Classical - Strategic Distance
StarDesc[1]: The further away the enemy is, the higher their speed;
StarDesc[2]: The closer the enemy is, the higher their defense.

Name: Classical - Innumerable
StarDesc[1]: When the enemy casts a skill,
StarDesc[2]: They have a chance to summon additional units.

Name: Classical - Relentless
StarDesc[1]: Each time an enemy attack hits your unit,
StarDesc[2]: They will gain a random affix.

Name: Classical - Pincer Attack
StarDesc[1]: Each enemy adds an affix to their team.
StarDesc[2]: Once the enemy is defeated, the corresponding affix will be lost.

Name: Classical - Merciless
StarDesc[1]: The captain and soldiers are hostile toward each other.
StarDesc[2]: Still, both will target your units first.

Name: Classical - First Come, First Served
StarDesc[1]: When defeated, an enemy will drop a buff.
StarDesc[2]: Both you and the enemy may pick it up.

Name: Classical - Lucky Escape
StarDesc[1]: When an enemy takes a fatal attack,
StarDesc[2]: they will randomly "dodge" it and recover some HP.

Name: Classical - Decapitation
StarDesc[1]: The "Boss" will grant its minions affixes.
StarDesc[2]: Once the "Boss" is defeated, you will immediately win.

Description: Huainan stood right in front. His hair was messy, and his dark eyes had no emotion in them. Changyu had never seen that look. He felt like there was ice in Huainan's eyes, and he would be devoured in the next second.

Description: Not that I have any proof... but I can't shake the feeling that, for someone who was so hellbent on getting what he wanted, he must still be out there somewhere.

Description: Wanshi cupped his hands to catch some water, only to let it slip through his fingers. He shook his head and walked out of the bathroom.

Description: Bianca thinks for a while, then removes Jett's speech from the file.

Description: Because now that she knew her sin, she recognized that it was he who would bestow the final judgment upon her.

Description: Ahead is death and our only hope. As long as the flag stands, you have nothing to fear.

Name: Praise for the Future

Description: All I can do is keep telling myself to follow my dream. Only then can I feel alive... That dream is to be back with you all.

Name: Popcorn Scene
Description: Audience clapping, audience enjoying. Audience chewing popcorn, audience cheering.

Name: Prologue
Description: His life has finally started moving.

Name: Cleanup after Performance
Description: The show is over, the stage is closed. The crowd has left, no one sees the actor's true emotion.

Name: Stinger that Nobody Is Watching
Description: I guess I'll make her wish come true.

Name: Ascent
Description: It has completely dried up on the gray soil and looks more like a piece of specimen. A white dove lands next to it, then chirps and flies away.

Name: Descent
Description: She stands up and looks at other wounded soldiers with visible compassion. I am surprised and even begin to think that she may be a believer. I have seen many soldiers with faith, but never such a kind and gentle expression on a soldier's face.

Name: Epiphany
Description: An egret lands on the top of the ruins under the sun, making a long and peaceful chirp.

Name: Christmas
Description: But they cannot stop her. She continues wandering on the desolated land, wielding her scepter.

Name: Annunciation
Description: The ravens fly away and the human starts to disappear. She reaches out her hand, but cannot grab anything. There is only darkness.

Name: Resurrection
Description: She opens her eyes among the blue birds. They are no longer occupied by pain and mercy, but are filled with care and courage.

Name: The Prophecy of Simeon
Description: The prophecy says a sword shall pierce through thy own soul.

Name: The Shepherd
Description: For she hears the audience's innocent call, and she hears the performers' tender reply.

Name: The Little Girl Lost
Description: The lovely girl told. She had wandered long, hearing that performer's song.

Name: Festival of Innocence
Description: The girl and her friends raising their innocent hands. Now like a mighty wind they raise to heaven the voice of song.

Name: Festival of Vicissitudes
Description: Is that mourning cry a song? Can it be a song of joy?

Name: The Fly
Description: The feeling of empathy is life, strength, and breath.

Name: Songs of the New Bard
Description: Youth of delight! Come here and see the opening morn, image of truth new-born.

Name: Echoes of the Ancient Bard
Description: She stumbles all night in the hollow universe.

Name: Night Boat
Description: Hundreds of years passed in the flutter of a butterfly's wings, and I sigh when I look back at the past. Spring has just arrived today, yet the flowers will wither tomorrow. Drink before the night ends and the lights go out.

Name: Ancient Pouring Glass
Description: I used to drink wine and enjoy music for days and squander my money just for fun. It is after I bid farewell that I realize how much time I have wasted away.

Name: Return of a Distant Dawn
Description: The plum tree branches cross the moon, creating a special atmosphere. The plum blossoms shade the moonlight, leaving dot shadows in the glass. No matter how I lament the past, those days have long gone. It's hard to see my old friends again.

Name: Dream Song
Description: It was drizzling and windy last night. I slept in but still felt drunk. I ask the maid who is rolling up the shades, yet she tells me that the flowers are still in blossom. Don't you know that there should be more leaves than flowers?

Name: Sadness of Farewell
Description: I wish to bid farewell, but my words fail me. He departs from me into the flowers and grass. There I stand, waving goodbye to him. The cherry blossoms are still in bloom and the willow leaves are still abundant, yet the wind of spring is blowing in the cold rain.

Name: Song of Fragrance
Description: The silk handkerchief is soaked by the sudden burst of tears. It's hard to resist the sadness of not being able to see him. My sleep is shallow, yet the screen stands tall in this silent long night.

Name: New Farewell Song
Description: We are separated by the Yangtze River. One stands on the north bank, and the other stands on the south bank. With whom should we drink wine and admire the moon tonight?

Name: Critical Point
Description: A large machine that had restructured after being corrupted by the Punishing Virus. Its underlying circuit board didn't incorporate the function to think, so as a Corrupted it could only follow the most basic order to attack. The headquarters named it "Assault Fort" for its unpredictable yet fearless battle behaviors.
StarDesc[1]: Enemy's power scales with Comm lv.

Name: Cataclysm
Description: A large machine that had restructured after being corrupted by the Punishing Virus. Its underlying circuit board didn't incorporate the function to think, so as a Corrupted it could only follow the most basic order to attack. The headquarters named it "Assault Fort" for its unpredictable yet fearless battle behaviors.
StarDesc[1]: Enemy's power scales with Comm lv.
StarDesc[2]: Currency can be used in Resource Shop.
