Name: First Conflict
Description: After parting ways with Liv, Gray Raven and the guards of Golden Vortex had conflict for the first time.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Mystery of the Light Pillar
Description: 30 minutes after Liv left, Lucia found the remains of Goldfinch members. She swore that she would find out the murderer.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Stumble
Description: It took Goldfinch almost three hours before they finally arrived at the outer walls of the central area...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: A Bridge Too Far
Description: Goldfinch members were attacked and chased by the guards. By evening, they realized they no longer had the strength to move any further... <color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Secret Passage
Description: It had been an hour in Golden Vortex, and only Lucia and the commandant were left. They were forced to fall back to the underground secret passage.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: The Queen and Hope
Description: After hiding underground for 15 minutes... A Construct caught Lucia's attention. It was walking without purpose like a corpse.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Battle in Alley
Description: Lee struggled for half an hour trying to get rid of the guards. He moved to the secret passage, hoping the guards would be lost...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 2</color>

Name: Awakening
Description: The invitation was in fact a subjugation. Lucia turned down the Queen's offer, so Gray Raven and the royal guards went to war.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 2</color>

Name: Companion
Description: Liv joined Browning, the leader of Goldfinch. They started searching for the tactical devices left behind by Goldfinch in the desert.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Protection
Description: The device seemed to have attracted lots of guards. As they quickly came close, Liv swore to protect Browning...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Trojan Horse
Description: To ensure the search mission could succeed, Liv decided to hack into the device's operating system...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 3000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Inquisition
Description: Watanabe spent a few minutes observing the guards. He decided to capture one for inquisition.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 4000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Back Alive
Description: Bianca found survivors of Goldfinch unexpectedly while collecting samples... They were still alive!<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 4000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Clash
Description: The negotiation didn't last long before Watanabe and Bianca escalated it into a violent event.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 4000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Culprit of Sandstorm
Description: Less than 1 hour into the Golden Vortex, Watanabe found the weather engine responsible for the sandstorm...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 4000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Tick-Tock
Description: While waiting for the results of sample analysis, Bianca heard some strange noise. She followed the sound but ended up in a group of "Silent Guards"...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 4000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Destiny
Description: Watanabe met Bianca again, but refused to abandon any Forsaken. Violence became the last resort once again...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 4000             Required units: 2</color>

Name: Invincible
Description: Kamui'd been fighting the Corrupted for almost half an hour. Roland managed to escape into the building... But Kamui wouldn't let him go!<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 4000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Unexpected Assistance
Description: Bianca considered the pros and cons for a brief moment, then decided to rescue the hostage.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 4000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Fatal Combo
Description: At noon, Watanabe brought Forsaken to help Bianca... But the Queen's royal guards were pouring bullets!<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 4000             Required units: 2</color>

Name: Imprisoned
Description: Roland stepped into Nithart's trap. Thanks to the antibody, the power of Punishing Virus was rapidly reduced.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Shield of Protection
Description: The guards had their eyes on Karenina the moment she stepped into the Golden Vortex.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Toolbox
Description: After thirty minutes of high-speed marching, Karenina finally got to demonstrate her strength...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Alarm of Misplacement
Description: As Nanami triggered the alarm in the Corrupted zone, she became a must-kill target...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Restructure
Description: Karenina received the analysis report of the antibody. She must re-establish the communication network to upload it...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Sealing
Description: To Roland's surprise, Nanami broke into the trap and resolved his biggest trouble...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 2</color>

Name: Builder's Puzzle
Description: After the walls were destroyed, the route became straight forward. It only took them minutes to break into the forbidden area.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Broken Sword
Description: Kamui knew it very well: as long as the Elite Corrupted was defeated, he could go after Roland again.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 2</color>

Name: Internal Trouble
Description: Roland finally got his power back. He managed to go around Nithart's surveillance network and sneaked into the core power room of Golden Vortex...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Reverse Invasion
Description: In order to find Roland's whereabouts, Nanami hacked into the guards' internal network. But Nithart saw it all...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Hidden Entrance
Description: With the construction blueprint at hand, they managed to arrive at the entrance to the Queen's palace within an hour.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 5000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: The Queen's Fury
Description: The Golden Queen was infuriated by the allegation. She decided to no longer care about the commandant's safety...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 6000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Traitor
Description: One traitor, one key. The conflict between Golden Queen and Gray Raven intensified...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 6000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Puppet
Description: To get back to the commandant, Karenina must break through the guards without consuming too much energy.<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 6000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Duet
Description: Gray Raven used the secret passage to lose the royal guards, but they were also separated from Nanami…<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 6000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Tearing Metal
Description: Golden Queen prepared special guards catering to the characteristics of Bianca's Construct...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 6000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Anti-Virus
Description: To slow down the contamination of Punishing Virus in the power system, Kamui needed to run the anti-virus program first...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 6000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Two-Way Door
Description: The evacuation would last approximately 2 hours. Karenina and Lee's cross-force collaboration would determine the fate of all Constructs...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 6000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Peak Extermination
Description: The power system had collapsed for 90 minutes. Gray Raven and other Constructs arrived at the evacuation point, but Golden Queen followed them...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 6000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Golden Pinnacle
Description: The evening had arrived. Gray Raven faced Golden Queen's final resort...<color=#0e70bd>\nTeam BP Limit: 6000             Required units: 1</color>

Name: Terminal
Description: Hassen gave you a priority mission. Before joining Strike Hawk, you need to retrieve the Constructs in the subway station with Gray Raven.

Name: Driven by Instinct
Description: Tifa was also one of the "new variants". How the Corrupted suddenly gained the ability to think was still unknown, but they quickly occupied the subway station after she was gone.

Name: Good Samaritan
Description: The Corrupted significantly impacted the retrieval of Constructs. Gray Raven decided to split into two groups; one would continue working on the retrieval, while the other would focus on fighting the Corrupted.

Name: Trespassing
Description: Operation Portal was run by Strike Hawk. After joining forces with them, Gray Raven was assigned the task of scouting in the Estate where the portal was located.

Name: Traps
Description: After scouting, Gray Raven's next task is night patrol.

Name: Final Warning
Description: Operation Portal is about to start. Gray Raven and Strike Hawk will launch a joint attack on the Estate.

Name: Take Caution
Description: A new variant, along with many Corrupted reinforcements, suddenly appeared in the Estate. Defeat the new variant and evacuate ASAP.

Name: A Twisted Hobby
Description: The operation has started again. Gray Raven will distract the enemy so Strike Hawk can infiltrate the Estate.

Name: Loyalty
Description: To attract as much firepower as possible, Gray Raven decided to enter the Estate building.

Name: A New Seed
Description: For some unknown reason, Gray Raven lost contact with Strike Hawk. The priority now is to get out of this place.

Name: Night Escape
Description: Strike Hawk suffered a heavy loss, so Kamui was reassigned to Gray Raven, whose last task here is to establish a safe zone.

Name: Elimination
Description: Cover Lee so he could set up the Iso-Device outside the Estate and hence establish a safe route between the base and the portal.

Name: Broken Chain
Description: A siren suddenly went off in the Estate. Check it out and ensure the portal is safe.

Name: Zack
Description: Turned out it was some Corrupted that triggered the safety robots. Destroy the Corrupted and the robots.

Name: Raging Sand
Description: The portal was tampered by Roland and failed to send you to the designated location. After some discussion, you decided to walk there.

Name: Panic Dive
Description: Kamui seemed to have this desert's information. Gray Raven headed toward the desert base for supplies and Construct maintenance.

Name: The Forsaken
Description: Gray Raven was met with some uninvited guests who called themselves the "Forsaken", and was attacked by one of the male Constructs.

Name: Reinforcement
Description: The Corrupted are attacking the desert base. Defeat them to protect the base.

Name: None Shall Pass
Description: The "Forsaken" Constructs seemed to know Lucia and Kamui. Gray Raven set off once again to seize the base and find out the truth.

Name: Silent Night
Description: The mysterious Construct who clearly disliked humans appeared again. He was upset by Gray Raven as they were taking orders from you. A battle is imminent.

Name: Noises
Description: The male Construct took advantage of the Corrupted's habits and got them to attack Gray Raven. Lucia seemed to have recalled something during the battle though...?

Name: Battle in Temple
Description: The enemy Construct's name was Watanabe. But before Lucia could recall more, a type of enemy named "Guardian" started to attack...

Name: Different Plans
Description: Liv seemed to be troubled by something lately. After some discussion, Lucia explained everything...
StarDesc[2]: Carefully consider the choice of Constructs.

Name: Mysterious Helper
Description: To prepare a secret Christmas celebration for Liv, other Gray Raven members and the commandant started to take action. They also met a great helper.
StarDesc[2]: Carefully consider the choice of Constructs.

Name: Operation Begins
StarDesc[1]: Attack Kuroro so it can drop White Cogs.
StarDesc[2]: Attack all you want to create lots of "Snowflakes".

Name: Lumberjack
Description: I promised mother and father that I would never let anyone hurt you. So, I'll handle the riskier parts...
StarDesc[2]: Try to find the best work pace for yourself.

Name: Super Christmas Tree
Description: Nanami brought back a Christmas tree, but Lucia and Lee were puzzled by the choice of decorations.
StarDesc[2]: Carefully consider the choice of Constructs.

Name: Operation Christmas
Description: Liv also ended up joining the preparation. Everyone was working full on for the final stage before the Christmas celebration.
StarDesc[2]: Carefully consider the choice of Constructs.

Name: Lone Wolf
Description: I promised mother and father that I would never let anyone hurt you. So, I'll handle the riskier parts...
StarDesc[1]: The mechanical firefly will ignite anything it touches.
StarDesc[2]: When in doubt... just wait for an opportunity.
StarDesc[3]: Running away is shameful, but it works.

Name: Fireworks and Presents
Description: Thanks to Karenina, the fireworks were lit up. When the folks gathered outside to watch the fireworks show, snowflakes started to fall.
StarDesc[2]: Carefully consider the choice of Constructs.

Name: Merry Christmas!
Description: In the end, everyone decided to take a group photo to celebrate Gray Raven and other Constructs' first ever Christmas.
StarDesc[2]: The greatsword doesn't feel quite right.

Description: All good now. Commandant, why are you using remote communication... Do you mind explaining?

StarDesc[2]: Wrong answers will reduce your HP.

Name: The Prince
Description: It doesn't matter what Commandant sees in me, because I only have one thing to do, right from the beginning.

Name: Happy April Fools' Day!

Description: The world fell into darkness, and I became the Lord of the Sky.

Name: The Rabbit and the Distant Moon

Name: Converging Streams
Description: One way or the other, a celebration always bonds people together even before anyone is aware of it.

When I become a beggar, I do not receive alms. I do not see any wish to give alms. I only receive disgust, suspicion, and hate from the one who stands above those alms-givers.

Description: This city is too small for a real war.

Name: Her Resolve
Description: You'll have to go over my dead body if you want to stop me.

Name: Buried Among Stars
Description: Earth is small, blue, and looks so lonely.

Name: Scout
Description: Wanshi turns his wrist, slowly clenching and unclenching his fist—just as he did years ago when he first awakened at the Star of Life.

Name: Correction
Description: The rambling young doctor and the boy both gaze toward an unreachable future, both seemingly convinced it will come true—whether they're the deceiver or the deceived.

Name: Fledgling
Description: He was like a fledgling who had accidentally flown into human society. Curious and careful, yet seriously absorbing all the new vocabulary.

Name: Dreamer
Description: After a moment of contemplation, all the memory data streams gravitate toward the beacon.

Name: Popular Literature
Description: The truth is, we orphans grow up reading these feel-good stories that society loves so much, only to become the protagonists of the next one.

Name: Swap Futures
Description: No. The truth in this case has been defined by others.

Name: What Is Salvation?
Description: As if accepting the rebellion of the teen, Melvie gently notes that this will tie in with his growth.

Name: Colorful Farce
Description: It was hyped up but turns out it was exaggerated. It flashed for a second before vanishing instantly.

Name: Renegade
Description: Shouldn't we figure out if they were controlling the "children" or something else?

Name: Keeping Demons
Description: They are just kids who've never even seen the world, trained to be soldiers the moment they were born. They are all "demons" Renegade 056 had created.

Name: Backtrack
Description: If you must require someone to stand in the mud to lift you up... then I would be the most suitable.

Name: Refutation
Description: They seem well-accustomed to such outbursts from across the table, continuing to listen to his statement with cold indifference, not even raising an eyebrow.

Name: Meds and Deceit
Description: No one wants to be that person again—the one everyone saves, only to be left behind once more.

Name: Lucid Dreamer
Description: Is it a coffin or amber that wrapped up the body?

Name: Mint
Description: Reach out to grasp those countless hands that lift this seed from the mire.

Name: Infant
Description: Since coming into existence as a human, Wanshi has never slept this peacefully before.

Name: The Present and Essence
Description: Before research is carried out, all experiment plans must be approved by the ethics committee. A strict ethical review needs to be performed and consent must be collected.

Name: EX - Shorthalt - Birthday
Description: Sure, fine. I won't complain about whatever mess you leave behind.

Name: EX - Shorthalt - This Trip
Description: The kaleidoscope-like world opens up in front of him again.

Name: Candy Express
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: Into the Summer
Description: A massive, muffled explosion follows, as flames rise from the clearing near the forest.
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: The Absent One
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: Silent Chorus
Description: The echoes of an old melody linger endlessly, tucked away in hidden corners.

Name: The Track Queen of Misono
Description: A fine title, but perhaps her ambitions are too modest?
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: Utopia
Description: By connecting the consciousness of all humanity, we can build a new homeland in the realm of the mind.
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: The Perfect Fit
Description: Doctor, if I may ask, have you developed what one might call a maternal affection for her?
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: Steady Speed Ahead!
Description: How is this possible? This is an 800-meter race...

Name: Summer, Fireworks, and...
Description: However, a weapon that cannot kill is nothing more than an ornament.
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: Eternal Night Fog
Description: Legend says that on moonless nights, a blood-red fog rises within Misono's campus.
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: Video World
Description: ...This is "one hell" of a welcome party.

Name: Yesterday Once More
Description: The world around her shatters like a jigsaw puzzle hitting the ground, breaking into fragments until only endless darkness remains.

Name: The Defeatist
Description: Your woven vision will echo through every corner touched by the tide.
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: Three Eyes, Six Hands
Description: You phony mystic, quit talking in your sleep!
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: Memory Projection
Description: The child's mind is filled with the memories of countless others, threatening to drown her own.
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: A Fated Farewell
Description: You should run forward... and I'll stay here.

Name: The Dreamer's Dream
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: In the Wake Of
Description: A shadowy figure in the distance quietly presses the stop button on a recorder, a light smile playing on the lips beneath the mask.
StarDesc[1]: Clear the stage with all members alive.

Name: Croupier, Tailor, Assassin, Spy
Description: The girl tilts her head as she softly calls out the shopkeeper's name.

Name: Eight-Shot Revolver
Description: Six trigger pulls, six empty chambers. The answer was clear.

Name: City and Stars
Description: Spotlights stain the early summer night sky in a mesmerizing brownish-purple hue.

Name: Cat & Mouse
Description: Like a precise mechanical clock, perpetually following its programmed instructions.

Name: Carbon Change
Description: She doesn't believe the nerve-numbing sweetness. She needs to smell danger.

Name: Marshmallow Layer Cake
Description: The speaker drags out the last syllable so long that it disturbs the still moonlight.

Name: Apocalypse Day
Description: People here are too close to the sun and too far from the confessional room.

Name: The Newcomer
Description: Serve the incomprehensible target. Serve the unfillable hollow.

Name: Against Their Will
Description: But none of this has anything to do with the outcasts living on the streets.

Name: Market Garden
Description: Culture dish, experimental sample, and microbiota are all indispensable.

Name: Culture Medium
Description: The extremely sensitive sensor array is enough to capture the slightest movement.

Name: Culture Medium
Description: The extremely sensitive sensor array is enough to capture the slightest movement.

Name: The Pioneer
Description: What has been will be again.

Name: Crimson Disease's Veil
Description: She grants the absolute happiness to the ones in this cage.

Name: Hunter's Logic
Description: A silver light tears open a gap between the sand and the stones.

Name: City in a Bottle
Description: Sometimes there are even birds flying through under the sky up high.

Name: King's Gambit
Description: Technological advancement can't wait for such a long experiment, nor can the disaster.

Name: Silver Rain
Description: The only winner walks in the sharp silver rain as if they have just been born.

Name: The Selection
Description: An artificial dawn capable of melting the darkness appears above the land.

Name: Exodus from the Park
Description: No one knows the answer before seeing her, right?

Name: Prologue
Description: What we've discovered may only be the tip of the iceberg. The size of their forces, their purpose, their stance—everything remains unclear.

Name: Weapons of War
Description: As weapons, they're not worth humans risking their lives to save.

Name: Counterclockwise
Description: Everything here, no matter how stable it may appear on the surface... is actually a fragile existence.

Name: Reborn
Description: If we allow students to view right and wrong as variables on opposite sides of an equation, their actions will shift from pursuing what's right to merely balancing the moral ledger.

Name: The Journal's End
Description: To me, just sitting here with you like this... this quiet moment is magical enough by itself.

Name: Matrix
Description: We both want to find ways to keep those children alive, even if it doesn't align with the company's philosophy.

Name: Truth of Annihilation
Description: I, Jetavie, was originally a mechanical consciousness model generated from a human consciousness sample.

Name: Migration
Description: Strangely enough, even though no data was lost, she still felt like something was missing.

Name: Dark Theme Park
Description: ...G227 doesn't have the capability to assault an area with such high Corrupted density. Dealing with both the source and that high-Energy entity requires elite Constructs.

Name: The Jester's Requiem
Description: This is the fourth time I've introduced myself to you, Commandant.

Name: Brother
Description: I don't want this piece of scrap metal as my brother! It's just a monster that looks like me!

Name: Prison
Description: Your mission is... to take "eggs" laid by "her" from that birdcage.

Name: Shatter
Description: Everything is breaking apart. Everything. And nothing can ever be pieced back together again.

Name: Someone to Rely On
Description: Humans are creatures who can only move forward by discarding the unnecessary.

Name: Instinct
Description: Don't worry... I'll protect you both.

Name: Memory Blockade
Description: You don't remember anything at all?

Name: Erroneous Death
Description: As thanks, how about I sing you a lullaby?

Name: Her "Rebirth"
Description: When those eyes open one day, what kind of thoughts will it have?

Name: Jetavie
Description: I love you, my child... and I hope you are born from love.

Name: Spark to Wildfire
Description: Everything started with "Vera" should end with "Vera."

Name: All in Vain
Description: Your sharpness, too, will inevitably be dulled until you reach the tragic end that awaits you.

Name: Reincarnation
Description: She blinks, and the old, ugly figure flashes away. Sitting across from her now is only a "new generation" human still studying at the military academy, looking at her with eyes full of curiosity.

Name: Leaving for the New World
Description: Just a lonely, vulnerable human who hasn't even graduated yet, without a proper weapon, injured and unsteady on their feet.

Name: Murky Sea
Description: That old man who used to sit in the corner? They died yesterday.

Name: Flying Off
Description: Just as you said, this was your first time setting foot on real ground, your first time witnessing such a scene, your first time experiencing these emotions.

Name: Convergence
Description: I don't want to stand by and make a decision I'm bound to regret.

Name: Hatching
Description: Through the eyes of the Punishing, the Old Human's body appears as if molded by spiraling threads of silk, emitting a faint glow.

Name: Recovery
Description: Strong hands press down on your chest, again and again, forcibly establishing a normal heartbeat.

Name: Iteration
Description: It's our turn now to fight desperately just to "stay alive."

Name: Surprise Troop
Description: She knows the melting snow will turn to mud, making this desperate winter escape even more difficult. This struggling convoy cannot withstand another attack.

Name: Flesh and Blood
Description: Heroes were always born from disasters, especially this time, when the red-hair Death is willing to let the hero have its flesh and blood.

Name: Junior
Description: The auditorium spotlights were rather stingy, casting their beams upon only a lucky few.

Name: Divergence
Description: We were once collaborators with aligned goals, but now it seems the time has come for us to part ways.

Name: Blade Dance
Description: Is the rope even that long?

Name: Lingering Silence
Description: The metallic scent of iron envelops you as her long hair cascades past your ears, gathering in the hollow of your neck.

Name: Living Fire
Description: I'll let myself be carried away by "heroism" for the ending I desire...!

Name: Good Night
Description: Just like before... Use me completely, burn me thoroughly, and be sure to turn these small sparks into a raging wildfire.

Name: Profile
Description: The debts I had to repay, I've repaid. The vengeance I had to seek, I've sought. The path I had to walk, I'm still walking.

Name: EX - Some Kind of Hero
Description: Captain, what lies beyond the sandstorm?

Name: EX - Poster Hero
Description: He has finally grown accustomed to Babylonia's warm sunlight.

Name: EX - Cliff
Description: If this world no longer has a cliff, then I will become the world's cliff.

Name: Godfather
Description: It was a winter day. There couldn't have been a worse beginning.

Name: Yesterday's World
Description: Even in the abyss of terror, one would never stop looking up at the stars of the past.

Name: Room Without a View
Description: Most of our misfortunes stem from our emotions, which can lie to us, betray us and even destroy us.

Name: Storm Impending
Description: Not even a farewell was bid.

Name: Dhole Days
Description: There is no such thing as bad weather. Some don't dress for the weather, is all.

Name: Scream
Description: The things known as memories—while they can bring joy, they sometimes inevitably bring loneliness.

Name: Concerto
Description: If I give you an apple, it may rot. If I give you a rose, it may wither. So I give you a teardrop of mine.

Name: Waiting for Shiva
Description: So, are we going or not? Let's go.

Name: The Final Three Acts
Description: To move forward, one must let go of the past.

Name: From Afar
Description: Facts come from fiction. Always remember this.

Name: Sandbox of Self
StarDesc[1]: Complete the main process of the stage

Name: Arena
Description: Her lance is sharp, like her fighting will—never dulled.

Name: Arena
Description: Her lance is sharp, like her fighting will—never dulled.

Name: Lockless Cage
Description: The doors to freedom have been sealed forever.

Name: Opening Lines
Description: Starting the story with a misunderstanding? Doesn't sound too bad.

Name: Caged Wish
Description: When you want to "fly away from here," come find me.

Name: Mutated Parts
Description: When machines break down, they can be replaced. So can people.

Name: Stars and the Soaring Bird
Description: Under a real sunset, we'll take another photo together.

Name: No One Escapes
Description: Prisoners confined here have no chance of escape.

Name: The Price of Flight
Description: Lies are barriers, lies are hell.

Name: Beyond Falsehood
Description: The illusions within dreams will ultimately shatter.

Name: Beyond Falsehood
Description: The illusions within dreams will ultimately shatter.

Name: Final Battle
Description: The winged mechanoid descends through the darkness, like a herald announcing the end.

Name: Until the Flowers Bloom
Description: A gentle breeze stirs as the sun crests the horizon once more.

Name: Waning Moon
Description: Once upon a time, in the forest, there was a remarkable "wizard"...

Name: Cold Rain
Description: Years later, gloomy dark clouds once again shrouded the manor.

Name: Nocturne
Description: The master patiently awaits the arrival of new guests.

Name: Fantasist
Description: Hello, Kamui. "Nice to see you again, Kamui." "Good night, Kamui."

Name: False Sun
Description: After all... I was the "only" survivor back then.

Name: Broken Bones
Description: Broken bones don't bloom. You will only grow into ordinary, forgotten mud.

Name: Blood Ties
Description: I don't wanna wear a dress!!

Name: Shattered Mirror
Description: You really think a family's held together by something as flimsy as blood?

Name: Eclipsed Void
Description: The sun that once shone with brilliant gold is now stained black and crimson.

Name: Setting Sun
Description: We will shield you. We will be expendable in your place.

Name: Lowly as Ants
Description: A swarm of worker bees and ants... You think you can become the sun?

Name: Closest, Yet Furthest
Description: They're just sending us to our deaths!

Name: Wandering Sun
Description: And that something, they realized, could be shared and passed on to others.

Name: The Mortal and the Mourner
Description: Always too late to save the ones you love, aren't you?

Name: Sunspot
Description: Family can never be a burden.

Name: The Sun-Seeker and the Ash-Bearer
Description: The sun was rising, but why? Why couldn't he see the light?

Name: No Way Out
Description: But... I don't have a home anymore.

Name: Phoenix
Description: In dying, he finally feels what it was to live.

Name: Why We Love and Why We Hate
Description: Because I will always love Ezette, my home.

Name: Be Free for Me
Description: Kamui, be free. Be free for all of us.

Name: The Fool and the Hero
Description: So that no one among us will ever lose their home again.

Name: The Orphan
Description: Now, I'm bringing you all home.

Name: Family Day
Description: Maybe it isn't that we can't find it. Maybe we just can't see it.

Name: Imminent Threat
StarDesc[1]: Trigger Matrix 3 times to gain an All DMG Bonus
StarDesc[2]: Matrix cooldown reduced by 30%

Name: Emergency
StarDesc[1]: Immediately enter Matrix each time when switching to a new character
StarDesc[2]: Character gains All DMG Bonus upon entering battle

Name: Hidden Current (I)
StarDesc[2]: Carefully consider the choice of Constructs.

Name: Trading Death
Description: In the beginning, people believed that this bizarre calamity, which rippled through the entire transatlantic region, would scar the historical record forever, a wound on the Golden Age at its height.

Name: The Returning Diplomatic Mission
Description: That is where every memory is kept. That is where all the hurt and all the feeling come from. It is the old web Helentine left behind in her past.

Name: Welcome to Port Podesta
Description: That's Port Podesta. A city perched on decline and mourning.

Name: The Mediocre Choice
Description: You don't trust me. You're just putting your faith in mediocrity...

Name: Downpour Alert
Description: Rising above death's grip... Such nostalgic words.

Name: Self-Reflection
Description: If I truly remember nothing, how am I supposed to become someone I used to be?

Name: Dual Conclaves
Description: Is this the Golden Age you wanted?

Name: Feast of Falsehood
Description: Let me give you the most direct, no-nonsense answer I can!

Name: The Returned
Description: All my pieces are on the board, Lithos. It's your move now.

Name: Miracle
Description: How do we best repay those who gave everything?

Name: Against the Current
Description: The ringing of a homecoming long overdue echoes across all of Port Podesta.

Name: Trading Death Ⅱ
Description: The scalpel bit deep, parting flesh. From the wound spilled not blood but shimmering, iridescent light.

Name: The Puppeteer
Description: Port Podesta, laden with Red Tide, advances toward the land. A calamity prayed into being by countless voices.

Name: Days of Yore
Description: Look. Reality's too harsh for most people. But you slap "Golden Age" on the cover, and they'll line up to buy it.

Name: Reunion Upon Departure
Description: So tell me... have you been happy? With your life so far?

Name: Rebellion of the Bananafish
Description: Let's send this damn dream... to hell!

Name: Her "Understanding"
Description: Years severed by death, stretched by regret, and forcibly stitched together by obsession now collide at last.

Name: Baptism for the Dead
Description: The brief, illusory dream of the Golden Age is drawing to a hasty close.

Name: The Sabbath
Description: And the stars of heaven fell unto the earth, even as a fig tree casteth her untimely figs, when she is shaken of a mighty wind.

Name: [Battle] Machine Wreckers
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.164:
"What's this? A rubbish dump? A single misstep might get us buried in this sea of mechanical remains!"
"Then don't go that far alone!"
"But we still need someone to cut a path, right?"
"So tired..."
"Hey! Open your eyes, ■■■! Two o'clock. Corrupted signals behind the remains."
"Great. No need to climb these trash hills anymore. Let's finish the Corrupted off at once!"

Name: [Battle] Penitent Saints
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.117:
"Gimme a break! What're the Missionaries doing here?"
"I didn't know you're afraid of them."
"Bite me! I just can't tolerate their religious mumbo jumbo! They remind me of my school days."
"Haha, is that so? Then I'll leave the Ronin IV to you."

Name: [Battle] Silence Workshop
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.018:
"Shishi, have you ever seen a Corrupted that quiet?"
"It's Wanshi! Don't mix up people's names!"
"...I don't mind it."
"Ha, hear what Baishi said?"
"Hmph... Those Corrupted're focusing on their work. We can bypass them without being spotted."
"Ah... I already threw a bomb at them."
"Tch!"

Name: [Battle] Forgotten Cogs
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.075:
"■■■, what's with ■?"
"You know those Corrupted's models, right?"
"Repairer Iα-I003 and Sentry Gun Mβ-I010, just some machines that could be seen everywhere in the Golden Age."
"Yep, and these commonly-seen machines were the first wave of enemies that brought destruction to this world."
"A record says that they destroyed City 76 when the virus outbreak started... That's why..."
"Hey! When did you become so close?"
"...Let's focus on our mission now.  We can talk about it when everything's done."

Name: [Battle] Forgotten Wings
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.156:
"I feel like I'm back to the time when I did shooting practice with Chrame just by looking at these monitors."
"Name is Chrome, and judging by your accuracy, I seriously doubt you've practiced your shooting skills.
"What? My skills are fine. I barely missed a shot in this mission."
"Because you didn't pull the trigger until you put your gun at their heads!"

Name: [Battle] Show Starts
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.141:
"Nothing personal, but their music is really lame. Seriously, which theme park would employ these robots?"
"If there's a theme park playing your favorite kind of music, I'm sure it's not a theme park. It must be an elderly center."
"Am I really that old-school?"

Name: [Battle] Fiery Battle
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.177:
"Get down!"
"Phew... That was close. But my hair... still got messy by it..."
"Pffft... Messy? Seriously?
"You ****** bastard! Why didn't you warn me earlier? Did you want me to get burned?"
"Well—"
"****! I'm gonna clean your clock after I'm done with this huge garbage!"

Name: [Battle] The Lost
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.240:
"■■■, Wanshi, are we going to end like them as well?"
"Who knows? It's just a possible ending for the vanguards like us."
"..."
"■, what is our credo?"
"Die for the survivors."
"Hmph, you're wrong. I'm not going to die here. I belong to a place full of cute ladies. That's why we'll get home. Don't you worry."
"Hmm... And this is not a place for sleeping."
"Haha, certainly. I guess Chrome's having a hard time leading Kamui while Wanshi's here, so we must return home together."

Name: [Battle] Death Charges
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.215:
"I Just stole a few sips of their wine. Damn it, how long will they keep pursuing us?"
"Stop complaining. Let's finish these four robots off around the corner."
"Cool. By the way, this situation reminds me of the street fights where ■■ and I grasped a wine bottle and beat the pants off our opponents."
"Got into street fights with a newbie? What were you thinking back in Kurono?"

Name: [Battle] Kowloong Crew
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.195:
"Hey, this is our old friend, isn't it?"
"Yazi of the Kowloong Crew. Looks like we aren't the first ones entering this place."
"How's it, Kuze?"
"Too late. She's been deeply corrupted."
"Then there's no other way... That said, if we took her corpse out of this place, what would other Yazis feel about it?"

Name: [Battle] Formidable Guardians
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.207:
"Leave these two big guys to me. It's been a long time since I met someone who could endure my strikes!"
"You didn't go over their reports, did you? Both Prime and Phecda can perform ranged attacks."
"Hahahaha, this is exactly why I don't need to go over those reports. Thanks, ■!"

Name: [Battle] Ruin Wanderer
Description: United Vanguard Squad Record No.107:\n"Never thought we would run into exploration robots in this kind of labyrinthine construction."\n"This might be a valuable ruin to them. Let's see what they've dug up."

Name: [Battle] Iron Maiden
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.098:
"Is this... Tifa after being modified?"
"Calm down. It's just something replicated with Tifa's data."
"Right... Tifa's already..."
"...Don't be like that. I'm sure you'll meet a much better girl in the future."
"Shut up!"
"Haha, let's go. All we have to do is crush the core. We can't let our comrades suffer from this kind of torture anymore."

Name: [Battle] Roseblade
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.031:
"Hello, is there anybody home?"
"Humph, so this is how you treat your guests—stabbing them with a blade."
"Looks like we have to teach you and your master some manners."

Name: [Battle] Call of Chilling Winter
Description:
Recordings from the Pioneer Joint Force Squad No.210:
"■! Drop down!"
"I just saved you again. You owe me a beer!"
"Look at those tentacles. I wish I can unsee the moment when you got all tangled with them."
"Just stay where you are, Wanshi. You're going to have nightmares after seeing this."

Name: [Battle] Growl of Silence
Description: Recordings from the Pioneer Joint Force Squad No.158:\n"Phew, that was tough. But that's it, big guy. Hey, Wanshi, ■! It was just two rabbits! What took you so long?"\n"I'm not ■! In fact, I think we should come back later. You seem to be having fun with this bear."

Name: [Battle] Machine Wreckers
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.164:
"What's this? A rubbish dump? A single misstep might get us buried in this sea of mechanical remains!"
"Then don't go that far alone!"
"But we still need someone to cut a path, right?"
"So tired..."
"Hey! Open your eyes, ■■■! Two o'clock. Corrupted signals behind the remains."
"Great. No need to climb these trash hills anymore. Let's finish the Corrupted off at once!"

Name: [Battle] Gardeners
Description: United Vanguard Squad Record No.152:\n"I remember the Deconstruct Units aren't Cosmos Industries' products, right? How can they coexist with the Gardeners here?"\n"Who knows? Maybe they're working together to green this place."

Name: [Battle] Bullet Storm
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.045:
"What the hell is this firepower?
"Save your breath and help me complete this explosion module!"
"I can't handle a sophisticated device like this... Wait, the Fire Units seem to have overheated. My turn now! Cover me!"
"Tch!"

Name: [Battle] Conceptual Dragons
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.023:
"These are Copperfield's bionic creatures that imitate dragons... I haven't seen a dragon like them. Wansui, do you know their species?"
"It's Wanshi. How hard is it to remember a name? Wanshi, don't sleep, say something to ■■■."
"You guys are so noisy... Oh right, you better stay away from them."
"No, ■■■, You've triggered the alarms of those monitors!"

Name: [Battle] Staring Eyes
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.249:
"Dodge, ■■■! It's no joke to be hit by these spheres!"
"How careless of me..."
"Wanshi, take ■■■ out of here. I'll catch you later."
"It's no big deal..."
"Go. Trust him."
"Humph... Hey, Big balls, where are you looking at?"
"...Seems like this is the farthest I can go... ■■■ is still unreliable, but luckily Wanshi's there. The mission is in their hands now..."
"Haha, at the end of the day, all vanguards have to follow their credo."
"Whew... Come! Corrupted!"

Name: [Battle] Abyss Ambushers
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.253:
"These must be the supplies left by a vanguard squad. Maybe we can find something to treat ■'s wound."
"...Wait, something's wrong."
"But ■'s wound is already!"
"Have you heard anything? It sounds like... a crab's moving."

Name: [Battle] Penitent Saints
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.117:
"Gimme a break! What're the Missionaries doing here?"
"I didn't know you're afraid of them."
"Bite me! I just can't tolerate their religious mumbo jumbo! They remind me of my school days."
"Haha, is that so? Then I'll leave the Ronin IV to you."

Name: [Battle] Postmen of the Wild
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.214:
"Wannian, ■, have you requested delivery service?"
"Nope? So this is another lady's love letter for me."
"Hey, no need to rush. I haven't even confirmed this is mine... Oh, I get it now."
"I'm flattered by your enthusiasm. Let me repay you with a bullet of mine."

Name: [Battle] Silence Workshop
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.018:
"Shishi, have you ever seen a Corrupted that quiet?"
"It's Wanshi! Don't mix up people's names!"
"...I don't mind it."
"Ha, hear what Baishi said?"
"Hmph... Those Corrupted're focusing on their work. We can bypass them without being spotted."
"Ah... I already threw a bomb at them."
"Tch!"

Name: [Battle] Forgotten Cogs
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.075:
"■■■, what's with ■?"
"You know those Corrupted's models, right?"
"Repairer Iα-I003 and Sentry Gun Mβ-I010, just some machines that could be seen everywhere in the Golden Age."
"Yep, and these commonly-seen machines were the first wave of enemies that brought destruction to this world."

"Hey! When did you become so close?"
"...Let's focus on our mission now.  We can talk about it when everything's done."

Name: [Battle] Forgotten Wings
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.156:
"I feel like I'm back to the time when I did shooting practice with Chrame just by looking at these monitors."
"Name is Chrome, and judging by your accuracy, I seriously doubt you've practiced your shooting skills.
"What? My skills are fine. I barely missed a shot in this mission."
"Because you didn't pull the trigger until you put your gun at their heads!"

Name: [Battle] Show Starts
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.141:
"Nothing personal, but their music is really lame. Seriously, which theme park would employ these robots?"
"If there's a theme park playing your favorite kind of music, I'm sure it's not a theme park. It must be an elderly center."
"Am I really that old-school?"

Name: [Battle] Fiery Battle
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.177:
"Get down!"
"Phew... That was close. But my hair... still got messy by it..."
"Pffft... Messy? Seriously?
"You ****** bastard! Why didn't you warn me earlier? Did you want me to get burned?"
"Well—"
"****! I'm gonna clean your clock after I'm done with this huge garbage!"

Name: [Battle] Heavy Fire
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.232:
"****! What the hell is with this armor?"
"Not just armor. Musashi VI's firepower's also no joke."
"Wanmiao, ■, I'm gonna attract his attention. You attack his weakness from behind."
"It's not his name! And we've already been doing this!"

Name: [Battle] Secret Tamer
Description: United Vanguard Squad Record No.162:\n"Have I told you that I once imagined myself being a matador after everything ends. It's pretty cool, isn't it? And look at how these three bulls are chasing me. I'm sure I have talent in it."\n"It's only because you're in a red suit."

Name: [Battle] Deep Sea Wanderer
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.259:
"Where'd ■ go? It's impossible for him to go anywhere with that wound."
"Look... there's a fluid trace on the ground."
"Gosh! What is this quake?"
"The Polar Soldiers..."
"They're coming from where the trace leads... Wanshi, take the supplies, weave around them and see what's happened over there. I'll meet up with you later."

Name: [Battle] The Lost
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.240:
"■■■, Wanshi, are we going to end like them as well?"
"Who knows? It's just a possible ending for the vanguards like us."
"..."
"■, what is our credo?"
"Die for the survivors."
"Hmph, you're wrong. I'm not going to die here. I belong to a place full of cute ladies. That's why we'll get home. Don't you worry."
"Hmm... And this is not a place for sleeping."
"Haha, certainly. I guess Chrome's having a hard time leading Kamui while Wanshi's here, so we must return home together."

Name: [Battle] Wandering Samurais
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.059:
"The sword marks on this wall are fresh. Stay vigilant. They must've been around."
"Judging by how deep these marks are, it's likely that they were dealt by Musashi IX."
"Tough enemies. Wanshi, ■, prepare to engage. I'm going to open the door."

Name: [Battle] Performer Puppets
Description:
Vanguard Union Squad Record No.228:
"Ugh, what disaster. I can't bring myself to hit a girl."
"Enough, we're burning daylight. Quit staring at me, and get going. You take care of the Ballwheel. Leave Kemuri to me and Wanshi."
"Good grief…… Can't I just leave the rest to you two?"
"...No, that won't do."
"Got that right, ■. You're almost as reliable as me."
"If it's not ■, then it's ■. All I ask is you to keep your mouth shut."

Name: [Battle] Death Charges
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.215:
"I Just stole a few sips of their wine. Damn it, how long will they keep pursuing us?"
"Stop complaining. Let's finish these four robots off around the corner."
"Cool. By the way, this situation reminds me of the street fights where ■■ and I grasped a wine bottle and beat the pants off our opponents."
"Got into street fights with a newbie? What were you thinking back in Kurono?"

Name: [Battle] Kowloong Crew
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.195:
"Hey, this is our old friend, isn't it?"
"Yazi of the Kowloong Crew. Looks like we aren't the first ones entering this place."
"How's it, Kuze?"
"Too late. She's been deeply corrupted."
"Then there's no other way... That said, if we took her corpse out of this place, what would other Yazis feel about it?"

Name: [Battle] Formidable Guardians
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.207:
"Leave these two big guys to me. It's been a long time since I met someone who could endure my strikes!"
"You didn't go over their reports, did you? Both Prime and Phecda can perform ranged attacks."
"Hahahaha, this is exactly why I don't need to go over those reports. Thanks, ■!"

Name: [Battle] Puppet Play
Description:
United Vanguard Squad No. 219:
"Wanshi? Aren't you supposed to be downstairs collecting data with ■■■? When did you get here?"
"BANG——!"
"Ugh~ I'm exhausted."
"Ahhh! Wanshi shot the other Wanshi?!"
"Hey, ■! How can you fall such childish antics?"
"It's not, ■ it's ■! Pfff, looks like it's the Kowloong machine over there."

Name: [Battle] Ruin Wanderer
Description: United Vanguard Squad Record No.107:\n"Never thought we would run into exploration robots in this kind of labyrinthine construction."\n"This might be a valuable ruin to them. Let's see what they've dug up."

Name: [Battle] Iron Maiden
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.098:
"Is this... Tifa after being modified?"
"Calm down. It's just something replicated with Tifa's data."
"Right... Tifa's already..."
"...Don't be like that. I'm sure you'll meet a much better girl in the future."
"Shut up!"
"Haha, let's go. All we have to do is crush the core. We can't let our comrades suffer from this kind of torture anymore."

Name: [Battle] Roseblade
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.031:
"Hello, is there anybody home?"
"Humph, so this is how you treat your guests—stabbing them with a blade."
"Looks like we have to teach you and your master some manners."

Name: [Battle] Roland
Description:
United Vanguard Squad No. 111:
"Hmph, I didn't know someone would be so bold to come to Babylonia."
"Pff, Roland."
"In the flesh~ Think your squad has what it takes? You languishing idiots think you're worthy of the battlefield?"
"Hahahaha, see for yourself."

Name: [Battle] Unknown Construct Alpha
Description:
United Vanguard Squad No. 237:
"Hmph, what on earth is in here. That detestable woman is here, too."
"Defensive retreat! We're no match for her."
"Even Wanshi is on his toes. Looks like we really are in trouble. We can go around that way. Get moving!"

Name: [Battle] Huaxu
Description:
United Vanguard Squad No. 185:
"This horrific place can even simulate Huaxu's data?!"
"The Ascendant must have already taken Huaxu in order to replicate something so vile."
"You being able to explain it so casually sure doesn't put me at ease."

Name: [Battle] Gabriel
Description:
United Vanguard Squad No. 251:
"What's the phrase again? Out of the frying pan and into the fire?"
"If I remember correctly, you're getting a promotion after this mission. Right, Wanshi?"
"I couldn't figure out why you wanted to come with us to this hellhole, but I'm sure glad you did."
"I'll buy you a juicy steak once this mission is over. Haha, relax. I won't leave you high and dry this time. It's a deal!"
"Alright, take the records and supply. I'll be there in a minute. If you don't hear from me, give this to the leader. Don't say that I stole it!"
"Don't worry, I'll give it to you just in case. Get going. I got an old score to settle."

Name: [Battle] Call of Chilling Winter
Description:
Recordings from the Pioneer Joint Force Squad No.210:
"■! Drop down!"
"I just saved you again. You owe me a beer!"
"Look at those tentacles. I wish I can unsee the moment when you got all tangled with them."
"Just stay where you are, Wanshi. You're going to have nightmares after seeing this."

Name: [Battle] Growl of Silence
Description: Recordings from the Pioneer Joint Force Squad No.158:\n"Phew, that was tough. But that's it, big guy. Hey, Wanshi, ■! It was just two rabbits! What took you so long?"\n"I'm not ■! In fact, I think we should come back later. You seem to be having fun with this bear."

Name: [Battle] Machine Wreckers
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.164:
"What's this? A rubbish dump? A single misstep might get us buried in this sea of mechanical remains!"
"Then don't go that far alone!"
"But we still need someone to cut a path, right?"
"So tired..."
"Hey! Open your eyes, ■■■! Two o'clock. Corrupted signals behind the remains."
"Great. No need to climb these trash hills anymore. Let's finish the Corrupted off at once!"

Name: [Battle] Penitent Saints
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.117:
"Gimme a break! What're the Missionaries doing here?"
"I didn't know you're afraid of them."
"Bite me! I just can't tolerate their religious mumbo jumbo! They remind me of my school days."
"Haha, is that so? Then I'll leave the Ronin IV to you."

Name: [Battle] Silence Workshop
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.018:
"Shishi, have you ever seen a Corrupted that quiet?"
"It's Wanshi! Don't mix up people's names!"
"...I don't mind it."
"Ha, hear what Baishi said?"
"Hmph... Those Corrupted're focusing on their work. We can bypass them without being spotted."
"Ah... I already threw a bomb at them."
"Tch!"

Name: [Battle] Bullet Storm
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.045:
"What the hell is this firepower?
"Save your breath and help me complete this explosion module!"
"I can't handle a sophisticated device like this... Wait, the Fire Units seem to have overheated. My turn now! Cover me!"
"Tch!"

Name: [Battle] Conceptual Dragons
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.023:
"These are Copperfield's bionic creatures that imitate dragons... I haven't seen a dragon like them. Wansui, do you know their species?"
"It's Wanshi. How hard is it to remember a name? Wanshi, don't sleep, say something to ■■■."
"You guys are so noisy... Oh right, you better stay away from them."
"No, ■■■, You've triggered the alarms of those monitors!"

Name: [Battle] Staring Eyes
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.249:
"Dodge, ■■■! It's no joke to be hit by these spheres!"
"How careless of me..."
"Wanshi, take ■■■ out of here. I'll catch you later."
"It's no big deal..."
"Go. Trust him."
"Humph... Hey, Big balls, where are you looking at?"
"...Seems like this is the farthest I can go... ■■■ is still unreliable, but luckily Wanshi's there. The mission is in their hands now..."
"Haha, at the end of the day, all vanguards have to follow their credo."
"Whew... Come! Corrupted!"

Name: [Battle] Abyss Ambushers
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.253:
"These must be the supplies left by a vanguard squad. Maybe we can find something to treat ■'s wound."
"...Wait, something's wrong."
"But ■'s wound is already!"
"Have you heard anything? It sounds like... a crab's moving."

Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.214:
"Wannian, ■, have you requested delivery service?"
"Nope? So this is another lady's love letter for me."
"Hey, no need to rush. I haven't even confirmed this is mine... Oh, I get it now."
"I'm flattered by your enthusiasm. Let me repay you with a bullet of mine."

Description: Recordings from the Pioneer Joint Force Squad No.158:\n"Phew, that was tough. But that's it, big guy. Hey, Wanshi, ■! It was just two rabbits! What took you so long?"\n"I'm not ■! In fact, I think we should come back later. You seem to be having fun with this bear."

Name: [Battle] Machine Wreckers
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.164:
"What's this? A rubbish dump? A single misstep might get us buried in this sea of mechanical remains!"
"Then don't go that far alone!"
"But we still need someone to cut a path, right?"
"So tired..."
"Hey! Open your eyes, ■■■! Two o'clock. Corrupted signals behind the remains."
"Great. No need to climb these trash hills anymore. Let's finish the Corrupted off at once!"

Name: [Battle] Penitent Saints
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.117:
"Gimme a break! What're the Missionaries doing here?"
"I didn't know you're afraid of them."
"Bite me! I just can't tolerate their religious mumbo jumbo! They remind me of my school days."
"Haha, is that so? Then I'll leave the Ronin IV to you."

Name: [Battle] Silence Workshop
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.018:
"Shishi, have you ever seen a Corrupted that quiet?"
"It's Wanshi! Don't mix up people's names!"
"...I don't mind it."
"Ha, hear what Baishi said?"
"Hmph... Those Corrupted're focusing on their work. We can bypass them without being spotted."
"Ah... I already threw a bomb at them."
"Tch!"

Name: [Battle] Forgotten Cogs
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.075:
"■■■, what's with ■?"
"You know those Corrupted's models, right?"
"Repairer Iα-I003 and Sentry Gun Mβ-I010, just some machines that could be seen everywhere in the Golden Age."
"Yep, and these commonly-seen machines were the first wave of enemies that brought destruction to this world."
"A record says that they destroyed City 76 when the virus outbreak started... That's why..."
"Hey! When did you become so close?"
"...Let's focus on our mission now.  We can talk about it when everything's done."

Name: [Battle] Forgotten Wings
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.156:
"I feel like I'm back to the time when I did shooting practice with Chrame just by looking at these monitors."
"Name is Chrome, and judging by your accuracy, I seriously doubt you've practiced your shooting skills.
"What? My skills are fine. I barely missed a shot in this mission."
"Because you didn't pull the trigger until you put your gun at their heads!"

Name: [Battle] Show Starts
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.141:
"Nothing personal, but their music is really lame. Seriously, which theme park would employ these robots?"
"If there's a theme park playing your favorite kind of music, I'm sure it's not a theme park. It must be an elderly center."
"Am I really that old-school?"

Name: [Battle] Fiery Battle
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.177:
"Get down!"
"Phew... That was close. But my hair... still got messy by it..."
"Pffft... Messy? Seriously?
"You ****** bastard! Why didn't you warn me earlier? Did you want me to get burned?"
"Well—"
"****! I'm gonna clean your clock after I'm done with this huge garbage!"

Name: [Battle] The Lost
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.240:
"■■■, Wanshi, are we going to end like them as well?"
"Who knows? It's just a possible ending for the vanguards like us."
"..."
"■, what is our credo?"
"Die for the survivors."
"Hmph, you're wrong. I'm not going to die here. I belong to a place full of cute ladies. That's why we'll get home. Don't you worry."
"Hmm... And this is not a place for sleeping."
"Haha, certainly. I guess Chrome's having a hard time leading Kamui while Wanshi's here, so we must return home together."

Name: [Battle] Death Charges
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.215:
"I Just stole a few sips of their wine. Damn it, how long will they keep pursuing us?"
"Stop complaining. Let's finish these four robots off around the corner."
"Cool. By the way, this situation reminds me of the street fights where ■■ and I grasped a wine bottle and beat the pants off our opponents."
"Got into street fights with a newbie? What were you thinking back in Kurono?"

Name: [Battle] Kowloong Crew
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.195:
"Hey, this is our old friend, isn't it?"
"Yazi of the Kowloong Crew. Looks like we aren't the first ones entering this place."
"How's it, Kuze?"
"Too late. She's been deeply corrupted."
"Then there's no other way... That said, if we took her corpse out of this place, what would other Yazis feel about it?"

Name: [Battle] Formidable Guardians
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.207:
"Leave these two big guys to me. It's been a long time since I met someone who could endure my strikes!"
"You didn't go over their reports, did you? Both Prime and Phecda can perform ranged attacks."
"Hahahaha, this is exactly why I don't need to go over those reports. Thanks, ■!"

Name: [Battle] Ruin Wanderer
Description: United Vanguard Squad Record No.107:\n"Never thought we would run into exploration robots in this kind of labyrinthine construction."\n"This might be a valuable ruin to them. Let's see what they've dug up."

Name: [Battle] Iron Maiden
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.098:
"Is this... Tifa after being modified?"
"Calm down. It's just something replicated with Tifa's data."
"Right... Tifa's already..."
"...Don't be like that. I'm sure you'll meet a much better girl in the future."
"Shut up!"
"Haha, let's go. All we have to do is crush the core. We can't let our comrades suffer from this kind of torture anymore."

Name: [Battle] Roseblade
Description:
United Vanguard Squad Record No.031:
"Hello, is there anybody home?"
"Humph, so this is how you treat your guests—stabbing them with a blade."
"Looks like we have to teach you and your master some manners."

Name: [Battle] Call of Chilling Winter
Description:
Recordings from the Pioneer Joint Force Squad No.210:
"■! Drop down!"
"I just saved you again. You owe me a beer!"
"Look at those tentacles. I wish I can unsee the moment when you got all tangled with them."
"Just stay where you are, Wanshi. You're going to have nightmares after seeing this."

Name: [Battle] Growl of Silence
Description: Recordings from the Pioneer Joint Force Squad No.158:\n"Phew, that was tough. But that's it, big guy. Hey, Wanshi, ■! It was just two rabbits! What took you so long?"\n"I'm not ■! In fact, I think we should come back later. You seem to be having fun with this bear."

Name: Vow

Name: Union
Description: Walking together in the summer night.

Description: Moonlight falls gently on her shoulders, bathing her in a soft, ethereal elegance.

Description: Lucia's smile blossoms in the misty blue.

Description: You look at her profile. Her ruby eyes seem to hold a restless cyan sea.

Description: Summer's on its last legs—tonight, let's make one of her wishes come true.

Description: For life is a pilgrimage, and in losing those we love, we learn that no goodness given or received is without purpose. Nothing truly ends here, nor does our existence conclude at the grave.

Name: Lamb's Lead
Description: But you're right before me. How could I let a death so devoid of meaning touch you?

Name: Die of Solace
Description: Gears mesh with perfect precision; dice tumble in infinite variation. All things are drawn into a dance of "order" and "chaos," ascending in an endless spiral.

Name: Marionette
Description: You've never been one for small solutions. Your choices have always shaped the world. That is who you are. Who you truly are.

Name: Reconciliation Day

Description: Thick fog hangs like a watchful shadow, blurring the line between dream and reality.

Description: Long-held wishes spread through the shadows, weaving dreams into one another.

Description: May the stars remember every promised moment we spent together.

Name: Coral Dreams

Name: Moonlit Whale Ballad
Description: The evening breeze draws the day's melodies to a close. You and Selena entrust your wishes to the waves and a drifting bottle. As whale song greets the breaking dawn, the words left unspoken quietly await the days ahead to be finished.

Description: A mission to preserve the island's culture brings you and Helentine into the forest, where you slowly uncover the hidden past this island conceals beneath its everyday warmth.

Name: Shadow Trace
Description: The truth behind the legend of the Great Conch draws you both into reflection on time and change. Beneath the night sky, Helentine makes a tender yet sincere confession.

Name: Battle under Fireworks
Description: Here's the mission. Destroy all the invading Corrupted... Let none survive!
StarDesc[2]: Destroy all the invading Corrupted... Let none survive!

Name: Another Journey
Description: The brief two-person journey has ended, and you are back on your own on an accident-free trip, just like the way it started.

Name: Suspicious Marks
Description: Suspicious marks were found in City 015. What could they be...?

Name: The Besieged Girl
Description: Hang in there! We're coming right now!
StarDesc[1]: Hang in there! We're coming right now!

Name: Forgotten Gift
Description: Hey, kids, do you want to give our "supplier" your gift yourselves?

Name: Operation "Red Envelope"
Description: Everybody get ready! Let's start collecting the baits!
StarDesc[1]: Everybody get ready! Let's start collecting the baits!

Name: Gray Raven's "Rescue"
Description: With Lee, you, and me here, we will never let accidents happen to Commandant.

Name: Battle for "Xi"
Description: For our lovely Xi! Go, my brave bodyguards! Hurry!
StarDesc[2]: Go, my great bodyguards! Hurry!

Name: New Year for Everyone
Description: Happy New Year. I wish we can celebrate every year like this.

Name: Day of Crisis
Description: Brace yourselves, for today is perhaps the most disastrous day ever in Babylonia...

Name: Mysterious Guest
Description: Maybe there's a mysterious world somewhere that nobody ever knows...

Name: Rabbit Running Late
Description: I'm running late... The grand welcoming ceremony is about to begin!
StarDesc[2]: Better run!
StarDesc[3]: Why is a raven like a writing-desk?

Name: Colorful Wrap
Description: Perhaps she just wants a dreamland like what she sees through the candy wrap.

Name: Lies and Friends
Description: Words can hurt. Lies hurt particularly hard.

Name: Tea Party for the Mad
Description: The tea party for the mad is about to begin! Come here for delicious tea, and sweet pancakes! Oh, and funny clowns, of course!

Name: Collapsed Tower
Description: Maybe they know the weakness of humans better. They know how to destroy the tower.
StarDesc[1]: Defeat the abnormal program as soon as possible
StarDesc[2]: Pay attention to the mission tips...?

Name: Wonderland
Description: We're all your friends<//??SEE??>. Everything here exists for you<//#%?#%?>. This is the wonderland.
StarDesc[1]: Defeat the Queen of the abnormal programs
StarDesc[2]: Don't drag Liv down.

Name: The Fools' Future
Description: A man who doesn't know his direction is a fool. A man who knows it but doesn't want to follow, is also a fool. But thanks to their foolishness, fools can still embrace their future.

Name: SP-01
Description: Nikola wants to test the combat team system found in the Niflheim Lab. You are no doubt his best candidate.

Name: SP-02
Description: You never thought you would meet her again.

Name: SP-03
Description: Somehow, the battle felt different from your usual experiences.

Name: SP-04
Description: Even in the data form, no team member should be left behind. That's what we call an ideal victory.

Name: SP-01
Description: More tests are on the way. This time, you are required to test more special systems. Are you ready?

Name: SP-02
Description: In order to make the virtual members less "robotic", the system AI purposely added more personalities. The battle is now a mess.

Name: SP-03
Description: Here they are, two identical Constructs. Let's make the most powerful "Storm" ever!

Name: SP-04
Description: The battle was a deadlock, but you received unexpected help. Was "she" really just an AI?

Name: SP-01
Description: Rosetta believed the Virtual Horizon system was found in the Niflheim Lab and could be extremely dangerous. She wanted you to stop the tests.

Name: SP-02
Description: Nikola and Hassen discussed how Virtual Horizon could be utilized for various purposes.

Name: SP-03
Description: Asimov and Rosetta found the information hidden under the AI's noises. The test must be stopped!

Name: SP-04
Description: You finally completed the test mission, but the system AI had an error.

Name: SP-01
Description: Your mind was trapped within Virtual Horizon. The AI that had been guiding you told you her name was "Ann." She hoped you could stay and fight forever.

Name: SP-02
Description: Ann was attacked by a monster that resembled Amberia. She then realized she was only Amberia's backup persona. Just when she was about to be devoured, the Construct she created saved her.

Name: SP-03
Description: Ann wanted to break free from the system, but the only way out was to defeat the monster "Amberia." She and all the Constructs would help you.

Name: SP-04
Description: Finally, you defeated the monster, but everything would soon be forgotten when you wake up, and Ann fell into an eternal sleep once again.

Wispthorn
Description: No one knew what Luna was thinking when she made herself this Coating. The glowing thorns entangled her like everlasting shackles. "May the apostates burn in the fire of these thorns."

Name: Grace
Description: She had witnessed many lives stepping into the divine hall. Never had she thought that one day that she could wear this outfit herself, as you took her hand in the blessed light.

Name: Florescence
Description: She quietly awaits, like a blooming bud that awaits to be picked up, hoping that her feelings would one day be discovered.

Name: Howling Crown
Description: When all things are silent, she still holds the shining spear up high, for she vows to protect, save, and uphold this world with dignity. You are the first to discover her in the snow.

Name: Scarlet Spring
Description: When spring returns to the garden, flowers would blossom brilliantly. The elegant pattern is made from a traditional gold-weaving technique. Qu does not have many opportunities to wear this outfit, but she still hopes this indispensable part of Tabula Akasha can be shown to the world.

Name: Azure Apocalypse
Description: Finally, it is over, and all the noises in the world come to a screeching halt. She returns to you, freed from all the thorns brought by the fate. You have each other for all the time from now on.

Name: Honor Model
Description: The custom-made uniform of the outstanding graduates of F.O.S. It is close-fitting but does not impede movement, flashy but not ostentatious, suitable for attending various occasions. The pure gold chain presiding on the chest always reminds the dresser to shoulder the mission of the elite, to hang the honor and responsibility on the heart, and to become a glorious example to lead the crowd.

Name: Reject and Accept
StarDesc[1]: Pay attention to CUB tutorial tips.
StarDesc[2]: Learn battle skills of CUB Toniris

Name: Reject and Accept
StarDesc[1]: Pay attention to CUB tutorial tips.
StarDesc[2]: Learn practical skills of CUB Toniris

Name: Trial Stage Placeholder
StarDesc[1]: Pay attention to CUB tutorial tips.
StarDesc[2]: Learn practical skills of CUB Toniris

Name: Street Rebellion
Description: With young and frivolous as the main concept of the design, the coating shows the rebellion and self of the lone wolf girl. Just standing at the corner of the street in this dress, it seems that it can release an aura that strangers are not allowed to approach.

Name: Endless Summer
Description: A momentary respite amid the bustle.

Name: Moment of Softness
Description: In this cold and silent night, you are the only light source.

Name: Past Shard
Description: She places a sharp short sword in Lucia's hand.

Name: Azure Bubbles
Description: So... This is what trust really is.

Name: Aria of Nymph
Description: A fae of the sea, resting by the distant shore, singing along the waves. She blesses the hero, helps the travelers, and protects the warriors from harm. But she never leaves this place, turning the waves into her garment, guarding a dream far, far away.

Name: Beach Frolics
Description: On the island where it is always summer, a young girl is swimming behind a small boat. Her joyful strokes might worry other swimmers or annoy the fishermen. But in the end, everyone is infected by her cheerfulness. Perhaps she will jump out from the sea when you are unprepared and enthusiastically shout, "Aloha!"

Name: Nitor
StarDesc[1]: Pay attention to CUB tutorial tips.
StarDesc[2]: Learn practical skills of CUB Nitor

Name: Wings of Dawn
Description: Legend says humans couldn't endure through the long night. So, they gathered the sparkles and shimmers of their life forces, and together they weaved a pair of feather wings for their god. The god took the wings and ascended to the sky, becoming the stars and shone light upon the earth so that humans could see daylight again. What about the god, you say? Well, the god... Even now, the god is still watching us from thousands of miles away, alone in a cold place.

Name: Boreas
StarDesc[1]: Pay attention to CUB tutorial tips.
StarDesc[2]: Learn practical skills of CUB Boreas

Name: Nosferatu
Description: Drink a glass of redness in the dark night in admiration of all beings. No longer accepted by the light, he will still protect you quietly in the darkness.

Name: Deed of Snow Leopard
Description: What can I do for you, Commandant...? Wait! Why do I have to do this? Although there is anger in the girl's eyes, she will only bare her fangs when she tries to protect her allies. She will also try her best to temporarily disguise herself for missions. And of course, she won't let anyone take her most important customer away from her.
StarDesc[2]: No character restart

Name: Jet Jaeger
StarDesc[1]: Pay attention to CUB tutorial tips.
StarDesc[2]: Learn practical skills of CUB Jet Jaeger.

Name: Spring Huntress
Description: Inspired by a royal spring hunting tradition thousands of years ago, this coating combines the traditional archer costume with the aristocratic clothing style. It dispels misfortune and misery that imprison the world with the sound of the deities and brings back spring.
StarDesc[2]: No character restart

Name: Tiger Imperium
Description: A tiger general charges onto the field, slashing at the enemies with his greatsword. To fit the user's untamed style, this new coating is designed with various wild animal patterns that seem to carry the power of a mythical oriental beast, making the user look even fiercer.
StarDesc[2]: No character restart

Name: Lover's Bridge
Description: The one who was once hidden in the darkness is once more standing on the battlefield under the spotlight. The difficult past that haunted him has now converted into an unbreakable bond. "Please sign your name on the new contract, Lee. Term: the rest of your life."
StarDesc[2]: No character restart.

Name: Moonhopper
StarDesc[1]: Pay attention to CUB tutorial tips.
StarDesc[2]: Learn practical skills of CUB Moonhopper.

Name: Dreamweaver
Description: A Coating made based on Pulao's description of her dream. With great passion, Pulao described the tea room waiters, the old man who sold prune drinks, and the shop owner who recommended her this suit. "Char siu buns are the best!" "You look like an idol in this suit!" These sentences always echo in everyone's M.I.N.D. after Pulao's passionate interpretation.
StarDesc[2]: No character restart.

Name: Wavebender
Description: She has reduced her armor to the minimum to make sure that she can surf freely in the feast of music. However, what interests her more is to lie under a sunshade and watch how helpless you are until she calls you when the time's right, "Commandant, get that for me." As a reward, she will share the small space under her sunshade with you.
StarDesc[2]: No character restart.

Name: Shimmer
StarDesc[1]: Pay attention to CUB tutorial tips.
StarDesc[2]: Learn practical skills of CUB Shimmer.

Name: Exorcist
Description: The exorcist's lamp shines bright before her chest with her silver blade reflecting her beautiful face. With her golden eyes fixed on the shadow of the past, she will eventually find out the truth at the end of the dark realm.
StarDesc[2]: No character restart.

Name: Niki US1000
Description: Power system online, wind-pressure balance calibrated, GPS configuration completed... Would you guide me to claim victory in battle once again?
StarDesc[2]: No character restart.

Name: Radiant Respite
Description: Even though he was not the initiator, he managed to give you a trip that was perfect for you. With the stars coming out above, he smiles under a street lamp, waving his hand. A night breeze gently puts a period on this date of yours, but before saying your goodbyes, you lightly readjust his slipping scarf. He would never have thought such a trivial move is already enough to make an ever-cool-headed person like him skip a heartbeat.
StarDesc[2]: No character restart.

Name: Punchy
StarDesc[1]: Pay attention to CUB tutorial tips.
StarDesc[2]: Learn practical skills of CUB Punchy.

Name: Vox Solaris
Description:
She gazes at the morning dew at dawn and starry sky at night. When spring arrives, she wanders along the melting river; when autumn comes, she touches the fallen petals.
On rainy days, the girl plays her music alone in the secluded temple, waiting for the sun to rise again.
Accompanied by the sky and four seasons, she grasps the remaining fragments.
No matter how far they are apart from each other and if the world responds to her invocation, she will keep praying for the one she misses.
The rain gradually eases off in the sound of her flute. When dawn comes, the bell rings too.
When the sky clears, flowers will bloom again.
StarDesc[2]: No character restart.

Name: Fiery Moon
Description: The fantasy of the pale moon has sealed the false god's grace, for it scorns lives fallen into corruption. She needs no daylight for her glory. With a mere gesture of hers, the ruins of a shattered sanctum will rise anew. Travelers back to the world, have you captured the light fleeting in her eyes?
StarDesc[2]: No character restart.
