Name: Mesektet
Description: She is a radiant sun that unfurls the banner to illuminate the darkness. She is the winds of the underworld that howl across the sky to mark the border between life and death. She is the vanguard of the gods, the leader of heroic souls, the deity silently awaiting the long night. When the sun sets and the sacred ibis spreads its wings, will you join her in an eternal expedition to defend the oath sworn by both of you?
StarDesc[2]: Have no character restart.

Name: Vermillion Bargain
Description: She turns her back against the gods in the deepest night and chants the forbidden spell with her life. Flickering candlelight sways over her familiar face. No matter how long you have parted from each other, the pact and oath you made will eventually light up the lost memories, bringing back everything that was once lost. "...I have come to fulfill the Crimson Pact."
StarDesc[2]: Have no character restart.

Name: Azure Apocalypse
Description: Finally, it is over, and all the noises in the world come to a screeching halt. She returns to you, freed from all the thorns brought by the fate. You have each other for all the time from now on.

Name: Flowing Dreams
Description: Finally, it is over, and all the noises in the world come to a screeching halt. She returns to you, freed from all the thorns brought by the fate. You have each other for all the time from now on.

Name: Diving Shadow
Description: Finally, it is over, and all the noises in the world come to a screeching halt. She returns to you, freed from all the thorns brought by the fate. You have each other for all the time from now on.

Name: Abyssal Dye
Description: Whispered to be a siren by some and a guardian goddess by others, her tears hold the promise of miraculous healing and eternal life. Countless travelers have embarked on quests in search of these tears... However, what moves her heart to shed those drops?

Name: Nightbreaker
Description: The starlight in her hand pierces through the darkness to open a new dawn from the white glow. She reveals her new blade as she walks on the edge of freedom, her silhouette, her steps, and her flames reforged by the blazing star.

Name: Dazzler
Description: The keynote of the battlefield is not black, white, or gray! Every leap of the girl will be the strongest order in the battle game.

Name: Ashen Wings
Description: Falling into a boundless dark dream, she changes into a gown weaved from gray feathers and embraces splendid illusions in the misty world. Before the wonderland fades away, she hums the song of yesterday.

Name: Revival Remedy
Description: Wearing a white gown, she taps the sign next to her. There are three words written on it: 'Hands of Miracle'. Turns out she is the renowned 'Reincarnation of the Legendary Doctor'... —Excerpted from Tales of the Babylonia Legends

Name: Revival Remedy
Description: Wearing a white gown, she taps the sign next to her. There are three words written on it: 'Hands of Miracle'. Turns out she is the renowned 'Reincarnation of the Legendary Doctor'... —Excerpted from Tales of the Babylonia Legends

Name: Revival Remedy
Description: Wearing a white gown, she taps the sign next to her. There are three words written on it: 'Hands of Miracle'. Turns out she is the renowned 'Reincarnation of the Legendary Doctor'... —Excerpted from Tales of the Babylonia Legends

Name: Pyrewatch
Description: Her sword burns down all the guilty souls, and her staff purges all the restless shadows. Her white outfit is soaked in the blood of the heretics; her fiery wings play a requiem for the sinful ones.

Name: Flying Apsara
Description: Clouds as her clothes, she gently plays the pipa like an Apsara, making people want to walk into an old dream that has lasted a thousand years along with the heavenly melody.

Name: Twilight Veil
Description: The girl whispers prayers under the stars in the twilight. She nocks the arrow and draws the white bow of the stars to chase away the mist, clearing the thorns for the lost ones along with the martyrs' souls behind her.

Name: Tiny Bad Wolf
Description: In a honey-like dream, the explorer follows the balloon into a funfair. Passing by floats and hot air balloons with her agile strides, she stops at the Ferris wheel and decides to place sea salt ice cream second on her hunting list.

Name: Blue Crush
Description: Holding her paintbrush, she adds a rainbow of vibrant colors to the golden coastline she has painted. Under the embrace of the summer sun, with the sound of a soda can popping open, she records yet another summer on her canvas.

Name: Prestigious Accolade
Description: If darkness becomes an endless, unyielding dream—what then? Let a raven's shriek rend the heavens to forge her hymn of triumph. When infernos claw at the gray veil of skies, when flames devour the cursed soil to smoldering silence, she rises, armored in dawn's first light, ablaze with glory's unforgiving radiance.

Name: River Dancer
Description: A pillow of fleeting, rippling dreams,An immortal lost in the drunken light.She steps upon waves, amidst the blooming lotuses,A crystal melody, fading too soon.Once I failed to see the illusion's truth,Now it binds me, as I am swallowed by the moonlit abyss.

Name: Crystalline Glance
Description: Azure freezes the moment you look back, drifting with seabirds, blending with the tide. Through her eyes, you glimpse summer—clear as crystal, farther than the waves.

Name: Warding Ritualist
Description: On the Ghost Festival, the Earth Deity grants absolution. A young woman in a flowing Taoist robe walks along the ancient path, a cool night breeze ruffling her hair. Tonight, the gates of the underworld swing open. Spirits, nourished by the offerings of their descendants, wander aimlessly, searching for sustenance. The young woman shakes her bell, lays out food and drink, and offers blessings to guide the lost souls to peaceful rest. But some resentful spirits refuse to be appeased and seek to wreak havoc on the mortal world. Whenever she encounters one, she lets out a scornful laugh, swings her hammer with furious force, and roars, "Ingrates! I'll send you straight to oblivion!"

Name: Candy Rider
Description: As twilight fades and the city bids farewell to the day, countless neon lights awaken. Under their glow, a girl quietly steps onto the ice rink. Unwrapping a piece of candy, she sets off with the whirring of her skates, leaving the noise and worries of the world behind as she speeds against the flow of time.

Name: Hell Sing
Description: His figure blurs against the backdrop of the desert, and the mark on his chest, of unknown origin, is as faded as the abandoned land itself. The self-exiled wanderer draws his blade. Only villains remain in this place, and moments later, their eyes hold only fear and despair.

Name: Wings of Equilibrium
Description: The first glimmers of starlight appear along the sky's edge. A lady with a goddess-like aura sits atop a hill. Her expectant gaze is fixed on the restless sea. All of a sudden, a solitary sail breaks free from the tempest's grip, steering toward a distant horizon... Her lips curve into a faint smile as she twirls her quill, etching yet another hero's legend into her annals.

Name: Carmine Ripples
Description: Known only to a few, a legend promises that mermaids who vault an emerald cascade will rise to divinity with scales sloughing away. A maiden drifts among her kin, yet her eyes cannot help but steal glances at the rainbow bridge behind with her mind ablaze with memories of clan oaths and ancestral chains. What worth is divinity if freedom lies beyond her grasp? In a surge of resolve, she turns around, plunging herself down from the bridge, toward the world of humanity.

Name: Resplendent Debut
Description: Opera performers take turns to come up on stage in elaborate costumes with their graceful movements and expressive singing drawing all eyes under the stage to them. In this moment, years of hard work off stage have paid off. Despite the hardship, the performers' dedication to opera has never changed. They're willing to explain the splendid world to the entire audience.

Name: Obsidian Balladeer
Description: The girl journeys through the endless shift between day and night, expressing her feelings through the sonnet. She plucks the strings, and in the lost season, the shadow under the dim light no longer leads to the journey back. She hums along to announce the beginning of the next play.

Name: Tapestry of Spring
Description: Ring out the old year and ring in the new with a new melody and the tapestry of spring. The girl infuses her best wishes into the window paper-cuts she made and put them up in the lingering coldness of the spring and the sound of firecrackers.

Name: Fatal Temptation
Description: People say a femme fatale can never truly win, yet she has found exactly what she longs for. The poor soul never had a chance to walk away unscathed—every fateful encounter beneath the late night, every meticulously planned ball... Sweet, shifting sands have already engulfed your sanity. The sharp heel of her stiletto presses against your red heart. The color of her lips is the perfect accent to the glint in her eyes. They say to stay away—but who could stop you from falling into this temptation?

Name: Hollow Crown
Description: Devoured by the flames and reborn in the ashes, she travels alone on the edges of the shattered lands. She is the lord of the doom fire and the end of humanity made flesh.

Name: Starward Dragon
Description: It is the flame core that pierces through the darkness and the light that outlines the dawn. Fate shall bless the embers and restore the order.

Name: Ritual of Souls
Description: Through veils of mist, the divine maiden hums a song, offering tribute to the heavens. She lowers her gaze, her fingers brushing through the sands of time, awakening spirits that have long slumbered for centuries. Amidst the fleeting mist, she seeks the answer till eternity.

Name: Sandy Spectrum
Description: Amidst the rhythm of waves crashing ashore, the girl leaps gracefully into the air. The pale violet silhouette flashes from behind, sending a spike through the air with precision. As the whistle blows, she and her sister exchange a smile and turn to face their opponents: "That was a warning for your foul."

Name: Thorns of Crimson
Description: Under a sky veiled in dying embers, pale remnants of the dead wander endlessly in this cursed world, where even death brings no rest. Among the ruins of the sacred sanctuary decorated by fallen idols, she lights a candle and prays with quiet devotion, bringing peace to each soul still clinging to sorrow and resolve, refusing to be swallowed by the void.

Name: Rippling Luminescence
Description: Night embraces the deep sea, where tides gently lap and stardust quietly drifts down. The Milky Way gently kisses the surf, leaving bioluminescent blue shimmers that shatter and reform with the waves, like a dream too fleeting to hold. The girl stands still, letting the soft glow rise to her ankles. She gazes at the profile of the person beside her, and in that moment, it strikes her that all the beauty in the world is just like this—quiet in its arrival, yet perfectly timed.

Name: Infernal Deliverance
Description: Plague is the whisper of the dead, and it is my duty to silence them... forever. In the Annihilation Zone, a raven-beaked shadow roams, guiding twisted souls into eternal stillness with the blade of a scalpel. It's not salvation, he says, but the final mercy for the living.

Name: Sparragon's Triumph
Description: On the day of the Sparragon's Triumph, all legions shall kneel in surrender. She stands before the shattered flagpole, the Gibbous Edge afloat in her palm. Her shoulder plates shape into bronze birds, her blade gleaming beneath lazuline feathers. Before the throne lie the fallen; behind it rises the glory of Kowloong. Dust shall be wiped away with blood - traitors, banished for eternity.

Name: Sash of Silence
Description: Beneath a sky choked with dust and blotted sun, ancient sands devour the broken steles of fallen gods. As the world-drowning dust storm swallows the last sliver of twilight, she emerges from the depths of this abyss where the dead gather. The divinities of ruin bow their heads, bestowing upon the newcomer the honor known as eternal silence. She is the shepherd who comforts all lost souls, and the general who commands death itself. She walks the fractured boundaries between existence and oblivion, gazing over the hunting grounds where eternity has fallen mute. In her realm, there is nothing—only the void's quietude, soundlessly proclaiming: death is the most ancient mercy life can receive.

Name: Roulette of Stolen Time
Description: The bone-white roulette wheel spins on, its madness never ceasing. None know when the game began, just as none can tally the souls mortgaged beneath the mountain of chips. To win everything, only to lose it all? Victory and defeat are but two faces of the same gilded Mammon Coin. As the golden flash of a card decides a fate, she smiles, gathering her opponents' fear and despair into her coffers. The house, after all, has no need for luck—only the patience to wait for the next soul to lay everything on the table.

Name: Lotus Melody
Description: Under the tall window, the girl cuts and sews her own gown from soft silk, dyed in the gentle colors of mist and water, carrying the cool scent of lotus dew. In the quiet night breeze, she walks with calm steps to meet the one returning home. She lifts her hand in invitation, wishing only to stay together, to share dawn and dusk, and to watch the flowers bloom through every season.

Name: Poetic Journey
Description: A campfire crackles at the edge of a quiet forest, its warmth rising with sweet, smoky air—honey-scented, laced with tales from the road. No one knows how many secret places those little paw prints have touched, just like no one knows where this journey will end.

Name: Gilded Creed
Description: She follows sacred precepts, dons golden armor that bears the weight of duty, and offers her prayer toward the falling aurora. Her oath of loyalty is forged into her very blood, set deep along her spine. When the storm gnaws at the northern frontier and her halberd rises through the snow, roaring at the dying sun, she does not step back. Not even once.

Name: Chromatic ☆ Night
Description:
Passenger Name: Nanami
Train: Galaxy Express 999
Travel Distance: Calculating
Destination: The farthest star
Friendly Reminder: This train's already zoomed past light speed, whoosh past super-light speed, kaboom past galactic zoom-zoom speed... ahh, we've totally lost track!! Oh well, let's just dash straight to the farthest, deepest end of the universe in one go☆

Name: Sanguine Justice
Description: During the twilight of the Golden Age, while still a cadet at the Military Academy, Vera was already deep in the field. She was embedded for months in undercover operations that would ultimately bring down several gang strongholds.At her personal request, archived intelligence has been revisited to create a gangster-styled coating on her Geiravor frame, a tribute to the perilous yet glorious undercover work that shaped her.\n...\n"Just one more nest. You sewer rats had your run. Now... let's see how you hold up against the real thing."

Name: Unending Pursuit
Description: Ravings swallow honesty. Madness devours kindness. A hunt through the mist has no end. If this is what it takes to step onto the stage of dawn, he will walk calmly into that endless mistbound night.

Name: Nightshroud Coronet
Description: The past lies steeped in crimson, and the reins of judgment are now in her grasp. In the name of the Countess, she takes her leave of the old epoch, slumbering deep in the fog. When the blood-red moon climbs full again, she tightens her grip on the blade in hand and steps into the winding, fog-veiled streets. Before the final curtain falls, she cleaves through the specters of the silence, her will unbroken.

Name: Stygian Pinion
Description: Bound by a covenant with fate, her wings rend the abyss of night before dawn's first light can pierce the veil. She hunts the monsters that prowl within the fog, and hers alone is the power to decree life or death. A faint glow shall one day sunder the unending dark, and the sins shrouded in fog will lie entombed forever beneath the long-awaited dawn.

Name: Shimmering Tide
Description: Twilight washes the sea in gentle hues. The heat of the day has faded, leaving behind a cool breeze that settles deep within. Hand in hand, we share the quiet of this stretch of shore. Here, where all the noise has drifted away, only the symphony of the ebbing tides and her soft whispers remain, weaving a memory of this summer that one wishes to cherish for an eternity.

Name: Azure Embrace
Description: Sunlight dances on evening waves, much like the shifting tides of the heart. The breeze whispers of the sea. In silence, the setting sun draws out our shadows on the shore. If only this breath of time could be frozen forever.

Name: Grand Duke

Name: Placeholder_汐光曳影
Description: Placeholder_暮色将海面染成温柔的颜色，白日的暑热已然消散，唯余沁入心脾的凉意，静静地彼此携手，共享这片沙滩上的宁静。在这片喧嚣已退的海域，唯有海潮的声音，和她的低语，共同编织成这个夏天令人想要永远珍藏的回忆。

Name: Placeholder_雾夜赤冕
Description: Placeholder_夕阳西下，流光于浪涛之上轻灵跳跃，如同此刻的心绪。微风轻送来海潮的气息，无需过多言语，只是任由落日将二人在沙滩上的投影渐渐拉长。此刻最大的心愿，是这一刻永不结束。

Name: Escape and Search
Description: It went away without leaving even one silver feather, yet she is determined to keep searching.

Name: Contact and Estrangement
Description: It seems to hide behind an electric fence, yet she is determined to reach out.

Name: Escape and Find
Description: It has gone, with even no one piece of silver feather left. But she, insists to find.

Name: Near and Far
Description: It keeps away, seeming to build a power grid for safety. But she, insists to touch.

Name: Difference
Description: Under the flickering aurora, she lets the cold wind mixed with frost and snow beat on her body and looks ahead.

Name: Strider
Description: It is the momentary thrill of breaking free from the surface—the thrill of freedom.

Name: Act of God

Name: Frost Oath
Description: The snow and storm has witnessed our vows to each other.

Name: Drowning
Description: They claimed its beauty was transcendent, even going so far as to describe it as a paradise.
StarDesc[2]: Have all members survive.

Name: To Flame
Description: Vera watches helplessly as the moth before her beats its wings and throws itself into the scorching flames time and time again for the sake of its "teammates" and their unlikely "survival."
StarDesc[2]: Have all members survive.

Name: Cliff Fall
Description: At first, she couldn't feel the dead along her path, so she never tripped on the rotting bones.
StarDesc[2]: Have all members survive.

Name: Pure Land
Description: Do you find this island beautiful? As beautiful as we imagined?
StarDesc[2]: Have all members survive.

Name: New Dawn
Description: The "treasure" hunt on the sea has an unexpected new chapter.
StarDesc[2]: Have all members survive.

Name: Mobius
Description: Don't worry. It's an honor, and it's what I want.

Name: Disorder
Description: I'm really interested in your story.

Name: Hope
Description: She's been on a long journey, so long that her memories are a bit blurry.

Name: Eve of Destiny
Description: This is a story that unfolded in the gaps of the past. The night before a girl set out on a journey to face her fate, also the last time she felt warmth.

Name: Squad of the Brave
Description: Like amber, the world encases the two on the earth forever.

Name: Ouroboros
Description: Humans have a nature to attribute the unforeseen to coincidence, but there is no such thing as coincidence from the macrohistory perspective...

Name: Ingredients Preparation
Description: 350g cream cheese at room temperature, 90g sugar, 3 eggs, 150g fresh cream, and 10g cake flour. You can add ingredients you consider reasonable. A great experiment requires a challenging spirit.

Name: Mixing and Whipping
Description: Patience and imagination are key to anything. Mix all your ingredients together in the bowl. Shouldn't be any problem as long as you do it according to the order indicated on the ingredient list... You only need to make sure you add the egg liquid correctly. When everything's done, pour the mixture into the cake molds.

Name: Baking and Heating
Description: I can hear someone's heart beats faster as the temperature goes up. Now put what you just got in the oven at 230℃ and let them rise for half an hour...

Name: Cooling Down
Description: You did it! Remember I told you to be patient? Rest them at room temperature for 4 hours, and you'll be able to taste you the fruit of your labor.

Name: Pre-Meal Ritual
Description: This is not mandatory. But just a little ritual will touch it up. For example, candlelight and your favorite formal dress.

Name: Time to Eat
Description: Great! Everything's done! Now pick up your knife and enjoy!

Name: Behind the Scenes
Description: Let's listen to her untold stories before we start.

Name: Stroll
Description: The girl walks in the wilderness, following the torrent of fate to chase the dim light of the soul.

Name: Dance
Description: The lonely whale has found her beacon.

Name: Eye to Eye
Description: No matter how the great clock of time turns, its dial bears but one true mark: Now

Name: Embrace
Description: Just reach out to touch me, and you will understand that I'm not an illusion.

Name: Regards
Description: No matter how time flies, love will always move the sun, the moon, and other stars.

Name: Sprout
Description: Mighty and fearless warrior— Take our finest sword, journey to the castle, and vanquish the Demon Lord!

Name: Branches
Description: She whispers into the hero's ear while slowly crushing the rose beneath her toe.

Name: Blossom
Description: A strange, piercing sensation cuts through the system's chaos, directly penetrating the hero's consciousness.

Name: Drop
Description: On the contrary, this is a dark fairy tale written specifically for you by a deranged scriptwriter of fate.

Name: Withering
Description: I've always wanted that person to find their way to somewhere more vast and free.

Name: Resurrection
Description: If you were writing it, what would happen after the hero enters the castle?

Name: Wintry Slumber
Description: Holy Maiden, please make your decision.

Name: Dreamer's Fate
Description: She feels the creature's fragility, its sadness and joy, as if she's aiming at herself and not the reindeer.

Name: Spring Flies By In Daylight
Description: Glory be to the Father, and to the Son, and to the Holy Spirit. As it was in the beginning, is now, and ever shall be, world without end.

Name: Past Frozen in Ice
Description: Bianca, if you were given another chance, would you choose differently?

Name: Future Lost in Blizzards
Description: The footprints buried deep in the snow look like the path once taken, or the way home.

Name: Chasing the Distant Vow
Description: Pure, heartfelt wishes once buried deep in the frozen earth of her dreams now bloom into flowers in reality's gentle warmth.

Name: Savanna
Description: After the humans all left, Earth is quiet for a spell, but then it starts seeing some new, even stranger faces wander onto the stage.

Name: Night Rain
Description: The savanna is like a sea of dark ink in the wind, and one can hear the low rumble of thunder stalking through the thick, wet air.

Name: The Hunter
Description: In the wild, it's all just a dog-eat-dog world—life and death are written in the stars. No one's a villain just for putting up a fight.

Name: Flowing Wind
Description: The wind is carrying the smell of plants, that earthy, damp scent that always follows a good rain.

Name: Blue Bolt
Description: The girl's giving a questioning look as a low rumble of thunder rolls in—the final big downpour of the rainy season is on its way.

Name: Morning Sun
Description: The sun's going down on the savanna now, but a new day's always just around the corner.

Name: The Maiden of Eden
Description: A strong wind follows, sweeping away the summer heat. Immersed in its flowing caress, you listen to its joyful, eternal whispers of freedom.

Name: Withered Homecoming
Description: Time sprouts branches and vines at her feet, twisting up her legs, wrapping around her body. With every step she takes, the bindings tighten. They whisper. They scream at her, "Don't go back. No one is waiting for you."

Name: Silver-Gray Airship
Description: Sunlight, the carefree gold of childhood, spills into the room with your entrance. The windows are filled with a dreamy, platinum glow, as if gazing out would reveal a future where imagination ran wild and free.

Name: Tilmin Kj?reste Liv
Description: Fairy tales by Liv... for Liv? You exchange a glance, mutual shock giving way to profound bewilderment.

Name: Where Time Ends
Description: Through the veil of tears, fragments of memory flash before her eyes—vivid and sharp as shattered glass, shimmering with countless colors.

Name: Whispers of the Paper Airplane
Description: The fierce winds brought only a shattered illusion, scattering the fragile hopes she had sent into the sky. She would have to wait much, much longer...

Name: Angel's Stairway
Description: Step by step... "Gray Raven" guides the angel back to the mortal world.

Name: Clouds, Dolls & Music Festival
Description: The smile makes her eyes narrow slightly. Unlike their usual appearance, they now hold a misty quality—so deep they seem ready to melt into feathery cirrus clouds at any moment.

Name: Highway, Skylight & Typhoon
Description: She lifts her hand slightly. The sunroof begins to slide open, and the transparent barrier between you vanishes little by little. Throughout it all, Teddy doesn't move her hand, keeping it suspended.

Name: White Dove, Newton & Hairstylist
Description: The sunlight paints her upside-down figure in gold. Her pink hair doesn't hang toward the ground but floats elegantly, flowing like silk in the windless air.

Name: Strings, Cocktails & Planck
Description: The violin music continues late into the night. Before it stops, you've already fallen asleep from the day's exhaustion.

Name: Rain, Sunset & Rainbow
Description: The whole sky glows with scattered rays, and the sea below reflects it all, like an inverted sky holding up a burning ocean of clouds.

Name: Stars, Science & Whirlpool
Description: The moonlight feels sharper tonight, its cold glow slicing through stones and wild grass, scattering in thin reflections.

Name: Me, the Future & Everything with You
Description: When her gaze drifts past your shoulder toward the open sky, the clouds seem to cross the distance between reality and dream, wrapping her gently in their light.

Name: Lone Journey
Description: Only the dead ever know true peace.

Name: Final Whispers
Description: The dead hold power over us through the one experience the living can never have: death...

Name: Love of Life
Description: The departed simply follow the habits they carried in life, nudging the living to replay the ordinary scenes they once knew.

Name: Blues at the Funeral
Description: Grief shouldn't last forever. Save some tears for tomorrow.

Name: The Soon-to-Depart
Description: You already know why you ended up in the realm of the departed, don't you? You... the one pretending you're not already half-dead.

Name: The Returned
Description: Rosetta, you've suffered enough on this lonely road.

Name: Who Knocks at the Door
Description: A guest arrives from the far side of the night, composed and calm, carrying whispers of the dead.

Name: Seek the Past in the Deep Night
Description: Thoughts pile on thoughts, wondering why this black bird speaks at all. Its bright eyes have already burned into the seeker's heart.

Name: Echoes from Beyond, Never Again
Description: Disaster once struck again and again, until a single sad word appeared in hope's elegy: never again, never again.

Name: Walk the Narrow Path
Description: She longs for poetic justice and a story where good is rewarded and evil is paid back.

Name: A Sea of Tears Suspended Like Arrows
Description: The pursuit of truth is like walking a long road through a rainy night. Even those who walk together can drift apart. May those who come after us be lucky enough to walk side by side.

Name: United in Light and Shadow
Description: The raven whose eyes reflect the human heart, doomed to be alone for staring at the truth, finally meets a soul that can fly beside her. Gray and black feathers become a mirror for the light.

Name: Astray
Description: It's all great and all, except it's nothing like the Kamui you know.

Name: The Setting Sun
Description: The calm mask on Kamui's face finally cracks. Unspoken emotions from the past seem to seep through the fissures, spreading across his entire expression.

Name: Thermal Conduction
Description: True love... is that moment of hesitation, the hand that reaches out only to pull back.

Name: Slow Burn
Description: He wishes that gentle smile would be directed only at him, at least for now.

Name: Rising Anew
Description: His accelerating heartbeat playfully pulses against your palm, while the steady warmth of your palm soothes the feverish heat that had been yearning for comfort.

Name: Familiar Ground
Description: I am the path you never took, the probability you forsook. I am...

Name: Ghost of the Past
Description: The things that she has lost, and the things that she has destroyed...

Name: Nuts
Description: Looks like her hidden snack stash got commandeered too.

Name: Blessing
Description: Memories hit Alpha like a wave.

Name: Illusion
Description: Illusions always disappear in the end.

Name: Fade In
Description: Please enter in an orderly fashion.

Name: Day
Description: Beneath the phoenix tree lies an important reminder.

Name: Exterior
Description: Welcome to Heleywood, the dream factory on the shoreline.

Name: Interior
Description: I am losing my mind with anxiety here.

Name: Night
Description: Flowers and popcorn, you can't have one without the other.

Description: ...To become the enemy of humans? To help those things that I once fought against?
StarDesc[2]: Have all members survive.

Name: Crimson Abyss Story - 2
Description: Only those with absolute power can shape the new world to their likings.
StarDesc[2]: Have all members survive.

Name: Crimson Abyss Story - 3
Description: Is everything she has ever done just a futile effort in this meaningless vortex of fate?
StarDesc[2]: Have all members survive.

Name: Crimson Abyss Story - 4
Description: The waves bring blurry reflections that overwhelm the lone boat of "Lucia" as if they will sink her into the depths of the sea."
StarDesc[2]: Have all members survive.

Name: Crimson Abyss Story - 5
Description: Even those who know her can hardly recognize her now. Still, her wishes have never changed."
